Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Cohomology of complexes *)
(** ** Contents
- Cohomology functor C(A) -> C(A)
- Alternative definition of cohomology complex
- Quasi-isomorphism in C(A)
- Cohomology functor K(A) -> C(A)
 - Construction of K(A) -> C(A)
 - K(A) -> C(A) is additive
 - Quasi-isomorphisms in K(A)
- Complex of kernels and complex of cokernels
 - Construction of the complexes
 - Cohomology and morphisms from cokernels to kernels
 *)

Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.UnivalenceAxiom.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.BinaryOperations.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Groups.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.TransportMorphisms.
Local Open Scope cat.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Kernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Cokernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pushouts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinDirectSums.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoriesWithBinOps.

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ + _" was already used in scope abgrcat.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PreAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Additive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Abelian.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.AbelianToAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.AdditiveFunctors.

Require Import UniMath.HomologicalAlgebra.Complexes.
Require Import UniMath.HomologicalAlgebra.KA.

Local Open Scope hz_scope.
Local Opaque hz isdecrelhzeq hzplus iscommringops ishinh.

(** * Cohomology functor *)
(** ** Introduction
   In this section we define the cohomology functor H : C(A) -> C(A). Suppose A is the category of
   abelian groups. Then H sends a complex
                     ... -> X^{i-1} -> X^i -> X^{i+1} -> ...
   to the complex
     ... -> Ker d^{i-1} / Im d^{i-2} -> Ker d^i / Im d^{i-1} -> Ker d^{i+1} / Im d^i -> ...
   where the differentials are given by zero morphisms. A morphism f : X -> Y is sent to the induced
   morphism. That is, f^i : X^i -> Y^i induces a morphism #(H f)^i : ker d^i_X / Im d^{i-1}_X ->
   ker d^i_Y / Im d^{i-1}_Y# $(H f)^i : ker d^i_X / Im d^{i-1}_X -> ker d^i_Y / Im d^{i-1}_Y$ as one
   can check.

   In category theory, there are two isomorphic ways to define the cohomology complex. We use the
   following definition. The ith cohomology is defined to be the cokernel of the morphism X^{i-1} ->
   Ker d^i, the KernelIn map of Ker d^i obtained by using the fact that d^{i-1} · d^i = 0. If f is
   a morphism of complexes, then by using properties of kernelin and cokernelout we construct the
   induced morphism.

   The map on complexes is constructed in [CohomologyComplex]. The map on morphisms is constructed
   in [CohomologyMorphism]. The functor_data is contructed from these in [CohomologyFunctor_data],
   and finally in [CohomologyFunctor] we prove that this data defines a functor.
*)
Section def_cohomology_complex.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.
  Let hs : has_homsets A := homset_property A.

  (** ** Cohomology complex *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (λ x : pr1 hz, A ⟦ C (i - 1), C x ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1) (Diff C (i - 1)) · Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (λ x : pr1 hz, A ⟦ C (i - 1), C x ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1) (Diff C (i - 1)) · Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (λ x : pr1 hz, A ⟦ C (i - 1), C x ⟧)
  (idpath (i - 1 + 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))

    apply (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C (i - 1)).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf
  (λ x : hz, AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ C (i - 1), C x ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1) (Diff C (i - 1)) · Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (λ x : pr1 hz, A ⟦ C (i - 1), C x ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1) (Diff C (i - 1)) · Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (λ x : pr1 hz, A ⟦ C (i - 1), C x ⟧)
  (idpath (i - 1 + 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))

    apply (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C (i - 1)).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
hz → AbelianToAdditive A
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz, AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ?D i, ?D (i + 1) ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
?D' i · ?D' (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (?D i) (?D (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
hz → AbelianToAdditive A
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A

      exact (Abelian.Cokernel (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel (Diff C i)) _ _
                                        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i))).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A
⟦ (λ i0 : hz,
   Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i0))
        (C (i0 - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
           (Diff C (i0 - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i0))) i,
(λ i0 : hz,
 Cokernel
   (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i0))
      (C (i0 - 1))
      (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
         (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
         (Diff C (i0 - 1)))
      (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i0))) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A
⟦ (λ i : hz,
   Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i))) i,
(λ i : hz,
 Cokernel
   (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
      (C (i - 1))
      (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
         (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
         (Diff C (i - 1)))
      (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i))) (i + 1) ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow ((to_Zero A)) _ _).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
   (Cokernel
      (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i0))
         (C (i0 - 1))
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
            (Diff C (i0 - 1)))
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i0)))
   (Cokernel
      (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1)))
         (C (i0 + 1 - 1))
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 + 1 - 1)))
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i0 + 1) 1))
            (Diff C (i0 + 1 - 1)))
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C (i0 + 1)))))
  i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i0))
           (C (i0 - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
              (Diff C (i0 - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i0)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
           (Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1))) (C (i0 + 1 - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 + 1 - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i0 + 1) 1))
              (Diff C (i0 + 1 - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C (i0 + 1)))))
    (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i0 : hz,
    Cokernel
      (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i0))
         (C (i0 - 1))
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
            (Diff C (i0 - 1)))
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i0))) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz,
    Cokernel
      (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i0))
         (C (i0 - 1))
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
            (Diff C (i0 - 1)))
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i0)))
     (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
   (Cokernel
      (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
         (C (i - 1))
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (Diff C (i - 1)))
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
   (Cokernel
      (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
         (C (i + 1 - 1))
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
            (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C (i + 1)))))
  i
· (λ i : hz,
   ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
           (C (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
           (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C (i + 1 - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
              (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C (i + 1)))))
    (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i : hz,
    Cokernel
      (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
         (C (i - 1))
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (Diff C (i - 1)))
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i))) i)
  ((λ i : hz,
    Cokernel
      (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
         (C (i - 1))
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (Diff C (i - 1)))
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
     (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (C (i + 1 - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
           (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C (i + 1))))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
          (C (i + 1 - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C (i + 1))))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
          (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
          (C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms
                (C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
             (maponpaths C
                (hzrminusplus (i + 1 + 1) 1))
             (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C (i + 1 + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
        (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
        (C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1 + 1) 1))
           (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C (i + 1 + 1))))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Defined.

  (** ** Cohomology morphism *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i · Diff C2 i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i · Diff C2 i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · (f i · Diff C2 i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= MComm f i: f i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · f (i + 1)
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · (f i · Diff C2 i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= MComm f i: f i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · f (i + 1)
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · (f i · Diff C2 i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= MComm f i: f i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · f (i + 1)
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· (Diff C1 i · f (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· (Diff C1 i · f (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · Diff C1 i
· f (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C1 (i + 1)) · f (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
    (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i) =
f (i - 1)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (C2 (i - 1))
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
    (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i) =
f (i - 1)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (C2 (i - 1))
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
    (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) =
f (i - 1)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (C2 (i - 1))
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i))) =
f (i - 1)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (C2 (i - 1))
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i))

     (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i))) =
f (i - 1)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= MComm f (i - 1): f (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1) = Diff C1 (i - 1) · f (i - 1 + 1)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)
· (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i) =

  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (f (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1))

tmp:= MComm f (i - 1): f (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1) = Diff C1 (i - 1) · f (i - 1 + 1)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz

  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1)))

· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i =

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1))
· f i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (Diff C1 (i - 1) · f (i - 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
  (Diff C1 (i - 1)) · f (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
  (Diff C1 (i - 1) · f (i - 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
Diff C1 (i - 1) · f (i - 1 + 1) =
Diff C1 (i - 1) · f (i - 1 + 1)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C1 (i - 1))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))

· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (C2 (i - 1))

             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))

hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
f (i - 1)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C1 (i - 1))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
f (i - 1)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C2 (i - 1))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C1 (i - 1))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
A
⟦ Cokernel
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
       (C1 (i - 1))
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
       (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)),
Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)) ⟧

    
A: AbelianPreCat

C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (Diff C1 i),
Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)) ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i) · ?h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C1 (i - 1))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))

     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)) ⟧

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
A
 exact (C1 i).
          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (Diff C1 i), C1 i ⟧
 use KernelArrow.
          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
 exact (MMor f i).
        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i · Diff C2 i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))
 exact (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (Diff C2 i),
Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)) ⟧
 use CokernelArrow.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C1 (i - 1))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
 apply CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero.
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism_Mor f i
· Diff
    (CohomologyComplex C2
     :
     Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) i =
Diff
  (CohomologyComplex C1
   :
   Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) i
· CohomologyMorphism_Mor f (i + 1)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism_Mor f i
· Diff
    (CohomologyComplex C2
     :
     Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) i =
Diff
  (CohomologyComplex C1
   :
   Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) i
· CohomologyMorphism_Mor f (i + 1)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism_Mor f i
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
          (Kernel (Diff C2 (i + 1))) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 (i + 1)))
        (C1 (i + 1 - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
           (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 (i + 1))))
· CohomologyMorphism_Mor f (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism_Mor f i
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
          (Kernel (Diff C2 (i + 1))) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 (i + 1)))
        (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
           (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 (i + 1))))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 (i + 1)))
        (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
           (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 (i + 1)))
        (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
           (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 (i + 1))))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
Morphism (CohomologyComplex C1) (CohomologyComplex C2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
Morphism (CohomologyComplex C1) (CohomologyComplex C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ CohomologyComplex C1 i,
CohomologyComplex C2 i ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff (CohomologyComplex C2) i =
Diff (CohomologyComplex C1) i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ CohomologyComplex C1 i,
CohomologyComplex C2 i ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ CohomologyComplex C1 i,
CohomologyComplex C2 i ⟧
 exact (CohomologyMorphism_Mor f i).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, CohomologyMorphism_Mor f i0) i
· Diff (CohomologyComplex C2) i =
Diff (CohomologyComplex C1) i
· (λ i0 : hz, CohomologyMorphism_Mor f i0) (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
(λ i : hz, CohomologyMorphism_Mor f i) i
· Diff (CohomologyComplex C2) i =
Diff (CohomologyComplex C1) i
· (λ i : hz, CohomologyMorphism_Mor f i) (i + 1)
 exact (CohomologyMorphism_Mor_comm f i).
  Defined.

  (** ** Cohomology functor *)

hs:= A: has_homsets A
functor_data (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)
  (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)

functor_data (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)
  (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)

ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
→ ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
(λ F : ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
       → ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A,
 ∏ a b : ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A,
 ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ a, b ⟧
 → ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ F a, F b ⟧) ?pr1

hs:= A: has_homsets A
ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
→ ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A

→ Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
 exact (CohomologyComplex C).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
(λ F : ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
       → ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A,
 ∏ a b : ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A,
 ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ a, b ⟧
 → ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  ((λ C : Complex (AbelianToAdditive A),
    CohomologyComplex C)
   :
   ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
   → ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
∏ a b : Complex (AbelianToAdditive A),
Morphism a b
→ Morphism (CohomologyComplex a) (CohomologyComplex b)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
Morphism (CohomologyComplex C1) (CohomologyComplex C2)
 exact (CohomologyMorphism f).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
CohomologyMorphism (IdMor C) =
IdMor (CohomologyComplex C)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
CohomologyMorphism (IdMor C) =
IdMor (CohomologyComplex C)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
CohomologyMorphism (IdMor C) =
IdMor (CohomologyComplex C)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
CohomologyMorphism (IdMor C) i =
IdMor (CohomologyComplex C) i

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism (IdMor C) i =
IdMor (CohomologyComplex C) i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism_Mor (IdMor C) i =
identity
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
identity
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i))) =
CohomologyMorphism_Mor (IdMor C) i

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
· CohomologyMorphism_Mor (IdMor C) i =
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
          (C (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
          (C (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
       (Kernel (Diff C i))
       (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · IdMor C i)
       (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (IdMor C) i)
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
               (C (i - 1))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                  (Diff C (i - 1)))
               (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i))))
    (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero (IdMor C) i) =
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · IdMor C i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (IdMor C) i)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
          (C (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i))) =
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · IdMor C i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (IdMor C) i)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
          (C (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i))) =
identity (Kernel (Diff C i))
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
          (C (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · IdMor C i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (IdMor C) i) =
identity (Kernel (Diff C i))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · IdMor C i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (IdMor C) i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) =
identity (Kernel (Diff C i))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · IdMor C i =
identity (Kernel (Diff C i))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · IdMor C i =
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) =
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
f: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
# CohomologyFunctor_data (f · g) =
# CohomologyFunctor_data f
· # CohomologyFunctor_data g

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
f: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
# CohomologyFunctor_data (f · g) =
# CohomologyFunctor_data f
· # CohomologyFunctor_data g

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
CohomologyMorphism (MorphismComp f g) =
MorphismComp (CohomologyMorphism f)
  (CohomologyMorphism g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
∏ i : hz,
CohomologyMorphism (MorphismComp f g) i =
MorphismComp (CohomologyMorphism f)
  (CohomologyMorphism g) i

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism (MorphismComp f g) i =
MorphismComp (CohomologyMorphism f)
  (CohomologyMorphism g) i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism_Mor (MorphismComp f g) i =
CohomologyMorphism_Mor f i
· CohomologyMorphism_Mor g i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
        (C3 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i)))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismComp f g i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm
        (MorphismComp f g) i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
             (C3 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero
     (MorphismComp f g) i) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero f i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (C3 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i)))
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
       (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
       (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)
       (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm g i)
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
               (C3 (i - 1))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
                  (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                  (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
               (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))))
    (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero g i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (C1 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (C3 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i)))
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
       (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
       (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        · MorphismComp f g i)
       (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm
          (MorphismComp f g) i)
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
               (C3 (i - 1))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
                  (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                  (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
               (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))))
    (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero
       (MorphismComp f g) i) =
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
           (C1 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero f i)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
             (C3 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i)))
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm g i)
        · CokernelArrow
            (Cokernel
               (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                  (Kernel (Diff C3 i)) (C3 (i - 1))
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (C3 (i - 1)))
                     (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                     (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
                  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))))
       (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero g i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismComp f g i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (MorphismComp f g)
     i)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (C3 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))) =
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
           (C1 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero f i)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
             (C3 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i)))
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm g i)
        · CokernelArrow
            (Cokernel
               (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                  (Kernel (Diff C3 i)) (C3 (i - 1))
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (C3 (i - 1)))
                     (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                     (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
                  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))))
       (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero g i))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismComp f g i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (MorphismComp f g)
     i)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (C3 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))) =
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (C1 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C1 i)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
       (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
       (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
       (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
               (C2 (i - 1))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                  (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
               (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i))))
    (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero f i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (C3 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i)))
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
       (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
       (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)
       (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm g i)
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
               (C3 (i - 1))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
                  (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                  (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
               (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))))
    (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero g i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismComp f g i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (MorphismComp f g)
     i)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (C3 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (C3 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i)))
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
       (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
       (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)
       (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm g i)
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
               (C3 (i - 1))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
                  (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                  (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
               (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))))
    (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero g i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismComp f g i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (MorphismComp f g)
     i)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (C3 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
· (CokernelArrow
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C2 i)))
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
             (C3 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C3 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i)))
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm g i)
        · CokernelArrow
            (Cokernel
               (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                  (Kernel (Diff C3 i)) (C3 (i - 1))
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (C3 (i - 1)))
                     (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                     (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
                  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))))
       (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero g i))

  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))

hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3

  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismComp f g i)

     i)

          (transportf

             (maponpaths C3 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C3 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq C3 i))) =

· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
