A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismComp f g i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (MorphismComp f g)
     i) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
    (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)
    (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm g i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismComp f g i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm (MorphismComp f g)
     i) · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C3 i)) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
    (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)
    (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm g i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · MorphismComp f g i =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
    (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)
    (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm g i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C3 i))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · MorphismComp f g i =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C3 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm g i)
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C3 i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · MorphismComp f g i =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
· (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · MorphismComp f g i =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm f i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · g i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · MorphismComp f g i =
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i · g i

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · (f i · g i) =
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i · g i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism C1 C2
g: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i · g i =
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f i · g i
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
⟶ ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
⟶ ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
functor_data (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)
  (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
(λ F : functor_data (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)
         (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A), is_functor F)
  ?pr1

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
functor_data (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)
  (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)
 exact CohomologyFunctor_data.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
(λ F : functor_data (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)
         (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A), is_functor F)
  CohomologyFunctor_data
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
is_functor CohomologyFunctor_data
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
functor_idax CohomologyFunctor_data
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
functor_compax CohomologyFunctor_data

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
functor_idax CohomologyFunctor_data
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: ComplexPreCat_data (AbelianToAdditive A)
# CohomologyFunctor_data (identity C) =
identity (CohomologyFunctor_data C)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C: ComplexPreCat_data (AbelianToAdditive A)
CohomologyMorphism (IdMor C) =
IdMor (CohomologyComplex C)
 exact (CohomologyFunctor_id C).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
functor_compax CohomologyFunctor_data
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_data (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexPreCat_data (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1, C2
⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_data (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C2, C3
⟧
# CohomologyFunctor_data (f · g) =
# CohomologyFunctor_data f
· # CohomologyFunctor_data g
 exact (CohomologyFunctor_assoc f g).
  Defined.

End def_cohomology_complex.


(** * Alternative definition of Cohomology complex *)
(** ** Introduction
   We construct an isomorphic alternative of [CohomologyComplex].
*)
Section def_cohomology'_complex.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
hz → AbelianToAdditive A
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz, AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ?D i, ?D (i + 1) ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
?D' i · ?D' (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (?D i) (?D (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
hz → AbelianToAdditive A
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A

      exact (Kernel (CokernelOut
                       (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                                         (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                                         (Diff C (i - 1)))) _ (Diff C i)
                       (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A
⟦ (λ i0 : hz,
   Kernel
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
              (Diff C (i0 - 1)))) (C (i0 + 1))
        (Diff C i0)
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i0))) i,
(λ i0 : hz,
 Kernel
   (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
      (Cokernel
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
            (Diff C (i0 - 1)))) (C (i0 + 1))
      (Diff C i0)
      (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i0))) (i + 1)
⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A
⟦ (λ i : hz,
   Kernel
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
        (Diff C i)
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))) i,
(λ i : hz,
 Kernel
   (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
      (Cokernel
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
      (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))) (i + 1)
⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) _ _).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
   (Kernel
      (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
               (Diff C (i0 - 1)))) (C (i0 + 1))
         (Diff C i0)
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i0)))
   (Kernel
      (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 + 1 - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i0 + 1) 1))
               (Diff C (i0 + 1 - 1))))
         (C (i0 + 1 + 1)) (Diff C (i0 + 1))
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i0 + 1)))))
  i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
                 (Diff C (i0 - 1)))) (C (i0 + 1))
           (Diff C i0)
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i0)))
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (C (i0 + 1 - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C
                    (hzrminusplus (i0 + 1) 1))
                 (Diff C (i0 + 1 - 1))))
           (C (i0 + 1 + 1)) (Diff C (i0 + 1))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i0 + 1)))))
    (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i0 : hz,
    Kernel
      (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
               (Diff C (i0 - 1)))) (C (i0 + 1))
         (Diff C i0)
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i0))) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz,
    Kernel
      (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1))
               (Diff C (i0 - 1)))) (C (i0 + 1))
         (Diff C i0)
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i0)))
     (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
   (Kernel
      (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
         (Diff C i)
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
   (Kernel
      (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
               (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))) (C (i + 1 + 1))
         (Diff C (i + 1))
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1)))))
  i
· (λ i : hz,
   ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
           (Diff C i)
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (C (i + 1 - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C
                    (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
                 (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))))
           (C (i + 1 + 1)) (Diff C (i + 1))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1)))))
    (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i : hz,
    Kernel
      (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
         (Diff C i)
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))) i)
  ((λ i : hz,
    Kernel
      (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
         (Diff C i)
         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
     (i + 1 + 1))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
factorization1_monic A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) · Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Image
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
factorization1_monic A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) · Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Image
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· (factorization1_monic A
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))) · Diff C i) =
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
    (Image
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· factorization1_monic A
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))) · Diff C i =
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
    (Image
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C i =
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
    (Image
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

    exact (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· factorization1_monic A
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))) · Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· factorization1_monic A
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))) · Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))
 exact (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· factorization2_epi A (Diff C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (CoImage (Diff C i))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· factorization2_epi A (Diff C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (CoImage (Diff C i))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (CoImage (Diff C i))
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (CoImage (Diff C i))
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
tmp:= factorization1 (Diff C i): Diff C i =
factorization1_epi A (Diff C i) · factorization1_monic A (Diff C i)
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (CoImage (Diff C i))
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
tmp:= factorization1 (Diff C i): Diff C i =
CokernelArrow (CoImage (Diff C i)) · CoIm_to_Im (Diff C i)
· KernelArrow (Image (Diff C i))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (CoImage (Diff C i))
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
tmp:= factorization1 (Diff C i): Diff C i =
CokernelArrow (CoImage (Diff C i)) · CoIm_to_Im (Diff C i)
· KernelArrow (Image (Diff C i))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage (Diff C i))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Diff C i)
      · KernelArrow (Image (Diff C i)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (CoImage (Diff C i))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Diff C i)
   · KernelArrow (Image (Diff C i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
tmp: Diff C i =
CokernelArrow (CoImage (Diff C i))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Diff C i) · KernelArrow (Image (Diff C i)))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage (Diff C i))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Diff C i)
      · KernelArrow (Image (Diff C i)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (CoImage (Diff C i))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Diff C i)
   · KernelArrow (Image (Diff C i)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
tmp: Diff C i =
CokernelArrow (CoImage (Diff C i))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Diff C i) · KernelArrow (Image (Diff C i)))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (CoImage (Diff C i))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Diff C i)
   · KernelArrow (Image (Diff C i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (CoImage (Diff C i))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Diff C i)
   · KernelArrow (Image (Diff C i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

    exact (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))
 exact (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
CokernelArrow CK2 =
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK2)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
e1: CokernelArrow CK2 =
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
    (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK2)
KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
CokernelArrow CK2 =
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK2)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
CokernelArrow CK2 = CokernelArrow CK2
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
e1: CokernelArrow CK2 =
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
    (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK2)
KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
e1: CokernelArrow CK2 =
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
    (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK2)
KernelArrow K1
· (CokernelArrow CK1
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (CokernelArrow CK2)
       (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK2)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
e1: CokernelArrow CK2 =
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
    (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK2)
KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
e1: CokernelArrow CK2 =
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
    (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK2)
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelArrow K2 · CokernelArrow CK1 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1

x, y: A

K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelArrow K2 · CokernelArrow CK1 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
CokernelArrow CK1 =
CokernelArrow CK2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1 (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK1)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
e1: CokernelArrow CK1 =
CokernelArrow CK2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
    (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK1)
KernelArrow K2 · CokernelArrow CK1 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1

K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
CokernelArrow CK1 = CokernelArrow CK1
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
e1: CokernelArrow CK1 =
CokernelArrow CK2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
    (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK1)
KernelArrow K2 · CokernelArrow CK1 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
e1: CokernelArrow CK1 =
CokernelArrow CK2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
    (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK1)
KernelArrow K2
· (CokernelArrow CK2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
       (CokernelArrow CK1)
       (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
e1: CokernelArrow CK1 =
CokernelArrow CK2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
    (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK1)
KernelArrow K2 · CokernelArrow CK2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1 (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
e1: CokernelArrow CK1 =
CokernelArrow CK2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
    (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK1)
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1 (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A

K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
iso K1 K2

x, y: A

K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
is_iso ?f

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
A ⟦ K1, y ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
?h · CokernelArrow CK2 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
A ⟦ K1, y ⟧
 use KernelArrow.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2
 exact (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1 K2).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
is_iso
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1
        K2))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
A ⟦ K2, K1 ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1
        K2)) ?g

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A

CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
A ⟦ K2, K1 ⟧

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
A ⟦ K2, y ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
?h · CokernelArrow CK1 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
A ⟦ K2, y ⟧
 use KernelArrow.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelArrow K2 · CokernelArrow CK1 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1
 exact (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1 K2).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1
        K2))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1
        K2))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1 K2)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1
       K2) = identity K1
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1 K2)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1
       K2) = identity K2

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1 K2)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1
       K2) = identity K1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1 K2)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1
       K2) · KernelArrow K1 =
identity K1 · KernelArrow K1

          
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1 K2)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1
        K2) · KernelArrow K1) =
identity K1 · KernelArrow K1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1 K2)
· KernelArrow K2 = identity K1 · KernelArrow K1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelArrow K1 = identity K1 · KernelArrow K1

          
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelArrow K1 = KernelArrow K1
 apply idpath.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1 K2)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1
       K2) = identity K2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1 K2)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1
       K2) · KernelArrow K2 =
identity K2 · KernelArrow K2

          
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1 K2)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq1 CK1 CK2 K1
        K2) · KernelArrow K2) =
identity K2 · KernelArrow K2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso_eq2 CK1 CK2 K1 K2)
· KernelArrow K1 = identity K2 · KernelArrow K2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelArrow K2 = identity K2 · KernelArrow K2

          
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK1, CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
K1: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK1)
K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2)
KernelArrow K2 = KernelArrow K2
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f

CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
KernelArrow K1 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K1) · KernelArrow K2
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
e1: KernelArrow K1 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K1)
· KernelArrow K2
KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f

CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
KernelArrow K1 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K1) · KernelArrow K2

x, y: A

CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
KernelArrow K1 = KernelArrow K1
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
e1: KernelArrow K1 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K1)
· KernelArrow K2
KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
e1: KernelArrow K1 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K1)
· KernelArrow K2
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K1) · KernelArrow K2
· CokernelArrow CK2 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
e1: KernelArrow K1 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K1)
· KernelArrow K2
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K1)
· (KernelArrow K2 · CokernelArrow CK2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
e1: KernelArrow K1 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K1)
· KernelArrow K2
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1 (KernelArrow K1)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K1)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
KernelArrow K2 · CokernelArrow CK1 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1

e2: KernelArrow K2 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K2)
· KernelArrow K1
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K2) · KernelArrow K1

A: AbelianPreCat

f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
e2: KernelArrow K2 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K2)
· KernelArrow K1
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K2)
· (KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
e2: KernelArrow K2 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K2)
· KernelArrow K1
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2 (KernelArrow K2)
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K2)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK1 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)

CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
is_iso ?f

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
KernelArrow K1 · ?h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
A ⟦ x, CK2 ⟧
 use CokernelArrow.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
KernelArrow K1 · CokernelArrow CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K1 CK2
 exact (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq1 K1 K2 CK1 CK2).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
is_iso
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq1 K1 K2 CK1
        CK2))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
A ⟦ CK2, CK1 ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq1 K1 K2 CK1
        CK2)) ?g

      
A: AbelianPreCat

CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
KernelArrow K2 · ?h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
A ⟦ x, CK1 ⟧
 use CokernelArrow.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
KernelArrow K2 · CokernelArrow CK1 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K2 CK1
 exact (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq2 K1 K2 CK1 CK2).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq1 K1 K2 CK1
        CK2))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1 (CokernelArrow CK1)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq2 K1 K2 CK1
        CK2))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq1 K1 K2 CK1 CK2)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1 (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq2 K1 K2 CK1
       CK2) = identity CK1
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1 (CokernelArrow CK1)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq2 K1 K2 CK1 CK2)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq1 K1 K2 CK1
       CK2) = identity CK2

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq1 K1 K2 CK1 CK2)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1 (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq2 K1 K2 CK1
       CK2) = identity CK1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
CokernelArrow CK1
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq1 K1 K2 CK1
        CK2)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
       (CokernelArrow CK1)
       (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq2 K1 K2 CK1
          CK2)) = CokernelArrow CK1 · identity CK1

          
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq1 K1 K2 CK1
       CK2)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1 (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq2 K1 K2 CK1
       CK2) = CokernelArrow CK1 · identity CK1

CokernelArrow CK2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1 (CokernelArrow CK1)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq2 K1 K2 CK1
       CK2) = CokernelArrow CK1 · identity CK1

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
CokernelArrow CK1 = CokernelArrow CK1
 apply idpath.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1 (CokernelArrow CK1)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq2 K1 K2 CK1 CK2)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2 (CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso_eq1 K1 K2 CK1
       CK2) = identity CK2

   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2

x, y: A

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K1, K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CK1: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K1)
CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2)
CokernelArrow CK2 = CokernelArrow CK2
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let K1 :=
  KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
    (Image
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (factorization1_monic A
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i) in
isMonic K1

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
K1:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Image
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (factorization1_monic A
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i): A
⟦ Image
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), Kernel (Diff C i) ⟧
isMonic
  (factorization1_monic A
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
 apply MonicisMonic.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz

    (Cokernel

          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
    (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
    (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i) in
isEpi CK1

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK1:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i): A
⟦ Cokernel
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))),
CoImage (Diff C i) ⟧
isEpi (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
 apply EpiisEpi.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let K1 :=
  KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
    (Image
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (factorization1_monic A
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i) in
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) · K1 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) (C (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)

i: hz

    (Image

          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (factorization1_monic A
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

factorization1_epi A

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let CK1 :=
  CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
    (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
    (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i) in
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i) =
CK1 · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let φ1 := KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) in
let φ2 :=
  CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1)))) in

  KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
    (Image
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))

    (factorization1_monic A
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i) in
K1 · (φ1 · φ2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Image
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))

K1:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Image
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (factorization1_monic A
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i): A
⟦ Image
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), Kernel (Diff C i) ⟧
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Image
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (factorization1_monic A
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i) · φ1 · φ2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Image
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))

     (transportf

  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i): A

    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), Kernel (Diff C i) ⟧
f1:= factorization1
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))

factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· factorization1_monic A
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1)))
CK2:= CokernelPath A (to_Zero A) f1
  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
· factorization1_monic A

(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))))
factorization1_monic A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)

     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

        (Diff C (i - 1))))

(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))))

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

  (Cokernel

        (Diff C (i - 1)))): A ⟦ C i,

     (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧
K1:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Image
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (factorization1_monic A
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i): A
⟦ Image
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), Kernel (Diff C i) ⟧
f1:= factorization1
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (Diff C (i - 1)) =
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· factorization1_monic A
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1)))
CK2:= CokernelPath A (to_Zero A) f1
  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(factorization1_epi A
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
· factorization1_monic A
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))))
CK2':= CokernelEpiComp A (to_Zero A)
(factorization1_epi A
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))))
(factorization1_monic A
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))) CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (factorization1_monic A
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
K3:= MonicToKernel' A
  (factorization1_monic A
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) CK2': Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2')
factorization1_monic A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) · φ2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Image
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))

    apply (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K3).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let φ1 := KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) in
let φ2 :=
  CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1)))) in
let K1 :=
  KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
    (Image
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (factorization1_monic A
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i) in
isKernel (to_Zero A) K1 (φ1 · φ2)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel_Eq C i)

       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), Kernel (Diff C i) ⟧
f1:= factorization1
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (Diff C (i - 1)) =
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· factorization1_monic A
    (transportf

       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1)))

     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))))
isKernel (to_Zero A) K1 (φ1 · φ2)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel_Eq C i)

        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i): A
⟦ Image
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), Kernel (Diff C i) ⟧
f1:= factorization1
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))

  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (Diff C (i - 1)) =
factorization1_epi A
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
· factorization1_monic A
    (transportf

       (Diff C (i - 1)))

        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
· factorization1_monic A
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))))

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))) CK2: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (factorization1_monic A

        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))

        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) CK2': Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK2')

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let K4 :=
  make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
       (Image
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1))))
       (factorization1_monic A
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1))))
       (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C (i - 1)))))
    (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel_Eq C i)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel C i) in
KernelArrow K4 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Image
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (factorization1_monic A
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i)

  (CoImage (Diff C i))

f2:= factorization2 (Diff C i): Diff C i =

· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)
φ1 · factorization2_epi A (Diff C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (CoImage (Diff C i))

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz

  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))): A ⟦ C i,
Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧
CK1:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i): A
⟦ Cokernel
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))),
CoImage (Diff C i) ⟧
f2:= factorization2 (Diff C i): Diff C i =
factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)
K2:= KernelPath A (to_Zero A) f2 (Kernel (Diff C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))
K2':= KernelCompMonic A (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
CK3:= EpiToCokernel' A
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)) K2': Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2')
φ1 · factorization2_epi A (Diff C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (CoImage (Diff C i))

    apply (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK3).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let φ1 := KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) in
let φ2 :=
  CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1)))) in
let CK1 :=
  CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
    (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
    (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i) in
isCokernel (to_Zero A) (φ1 · φ2) CK1
  (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel_Eq C i)

(h : A

         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

            (Diff C (i - 1))), w ⟧),

        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i): A
⟦ Cokernel
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))),
CoImage (Diff C i) ⟧
f2:= factorization2 (Diff C i): Diff C i =
factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)
K2:= KernelPath A (to_Zero A) f2 (Kernel (Diff C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))
K2':= KernelCompMonic A (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
CK3:= EpiToCokernel' A
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)) K2': Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2')

h: A
⟦ Cokernel
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), w ⟧
H': φ1 · (φ2 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) w
A ⟦ CoImage (Diff C i), w ⟧

f2:= factorization2 (Diff C i): Diff C i =
factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)
K2:= KernelPath A (to_Zero A) f2 (Kernel (Diff C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))
K2':= KernelCompMonic A (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
CK3:= EpiToCokernel' A
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)) K2': Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2')
w: A
h: A
⟦ Cokernel
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), w ⟧
H': φ1 · (φ2 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) w
factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK3 w (φ2 · h) H' =
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) · h

  (Cokernel
     (transportf

        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))

· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)

factorization2_epi A (Diff C i) = CokernelArrow CK3
 apply idpath.

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

f2:= factorization2 (Diff C i): Diff C i =

· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)
K2:= KernelPath A (to_Zero A) f2 (Kernel (Diff C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)

h: A
⟦ Cokernel
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

h: A
⟦ Cokernel
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), w ⟧
H': φ1 · (φ2 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) w
y: A ⟦ CoImage (Diff C i), w ⟧
X: CK1 · y = h
CK1 · y =
CK1 · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK3 w (φ2 · h) H'

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
φ1:= KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)): A ⟦ Kernel (Diff C i), C i ⟧
φ2:= CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))): A ⟦ C i,
Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧
CK1:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i): A
⟦ Cokernel
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))),
CoImage (Diff C i) ⟧
f2:= factorization2 (Diff C i): Diff C i =
factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)
K2:= KernelPath A (to_Zero A) f2 (Kernel (Diff C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))
K2':= KernelCompMonic A (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
CK3:= EpiToCokernel' A
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)) K2': Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2')

⟦ Cokernel

       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

       (Diff C (i - 1))), w ⟧

y: A ⟦ CoImage (Diff C i), w ⟧
X: CK1 · y = h

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz

  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))): A ⟦ C i,
Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧
CK1:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i): A
⟦ Cokernel
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))),
CoImage (Diff C i) ⟧
f2:= factorization2 (Diff C i): Diff C i =
factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)
K2:= KernelPath A (to_Zero A) f2 (Kernel (Diff C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))
K2':= KernelCompMonic A (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
CK3:= EpiToCokernel' A
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)) K2': Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2')
w: A
h: A
⟦ Cokernel
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), w ⟧
H': φ1 · (φ2 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) w
y: A ⟦ CoImage (Diff C i), w ⟧
X: CK1 · y = h

  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) · h =
