· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK3 w (φ2 · h) H'

        
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
φ1:= KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)): A ⟦ Kernel (Diff C i), C i ⟧
φ2:= CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))): A ⟦ C i,
Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧
CK1:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i): A
⟦ Cokernel
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))),
CoImage (Diff C i) ⟧
f2:= factorization2 (Diff C i): Diff C i =
factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
· factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)
K2:= KernelPath A (to_Zero A) f2 (Kernel (Diff C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))
K2':= KernelCompMonic A (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
CK3:= EpiToCokernel' A
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)) K2': Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2')
w: A
h: A
⟦ Cokernel
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), w ⟧
H': φ1 · (φ2 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) w
y: A ⟦ CoImage (Diff C i), w ⟧
X: CK1 · y = h
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) · h = φ2 · h
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let CK4 :=
  make_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C (i - 1)))))
    (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
       (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
       (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))
    (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel_Eq C i)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel C i) in
CokernelArrow CK4 =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let CK4 :=
  make_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C (i - 1)))))
    (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
       (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
       (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))
    (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel_Eq C i)
    (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel C i) in
CokernelArrow CK4 =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1)))) (CoImage (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition CohomologyComplexIso_Mor1 (C : Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i : hz) :
    let K1 := KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i) in
    A⟦Cokernel
        (factorization1_epi
           A (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1))) (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                            (Diff C (i - 1))) · K1),
       Cokernel
         (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) (C (i - 1))
                   (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1))) (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                               (Diff C (i - 1))) (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))⟧ :=
    @CokernelOutPaths_is_iso_mor
      A (to_Zero A) _ _ _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_mor_eq1 C i) (Cokernel _) (Cokernel _).

  Definition CohomologyComplexIso_Mor2 (C : Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i : hz) :
    let K1 := KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i) in
    A ⟦Cokernel K1,
       Cokernel
         (factorization1_epi
            A (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1))) (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                             (Diff C (i - 1))) · K1)⟧ :=
    let K1 := KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i) in
    CokernelEpiComp_mor2
      A (to_Zero A) (factorization1_epi A (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                                     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                                     (Diff C (i - 1))))
      K1 (Cokernel _) (Cokernel _).

  Definition CohomologyComplexIso_Mor3 (C : Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i : hz) :
    let CK1 := CokernelOut
                 (to_Zero A)
                 (Cokernel (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))))
                 _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i) in
    A⟦Kernel
        (CokernelOut
           (to_Zero A) (Cokernel
                      (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                  (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)),
      Kernel (CK1 · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))⟧ :=
    @KernelInPaths_is_iso_mor
      A (to_Zero A) _ _ _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_mor_eq2 C i) (Kernel _) (Kernel _).

  Definition CohomologyComplexIso_Mor4 (C : Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i : hz) :
    let CK1 := CokernelOut
                 (to_Zero A)
                 (Cokernel (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))))
                 _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i) in
    A ⟦Kernel (CK1 · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)), Kernel CK1⟧ :=
    (KernelCompMonic_mor1 A (to_Zero A) _ _ (Kernel _) (Kernel _)).

  Definition CohomologyComplexIso_Mor5 (C : Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i : hz) :
    let K1 := KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i)) _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i) in
    let K4 := make_Kernel _ _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel_Eq C i)
                         (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel C i) in
    A⟦Cokernel (KernelArrow K4), Cokernel K1⟧ :=
    @CokernelOutPaths_is_iso_mor
      A (to_Zero A) _ _ _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_KernelArrow C i) (Cokernel _) (Cokernel _).

  Definition CohomologyComplexIso_Mor6 (C : Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i : hz) :
    let φ1 := KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) in
    let φ2 := CokernelArrow (Cokernel (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                                  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                                  (Diff C (i - 1)))) in
    let K4 := make_Kernel _ _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel_Eq C i)
                        (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel C i) in
    iso (CoImage (φ1 · φ2)) (Cokernel (KernelArrow K4)) :=
    let φ1 := KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) in
    let φ2 := CokernelArrow (Cokernel (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                                  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                                  (Diff C (i - 1)))) in
    let K4 := make_Kernel _ _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel_Eq C i)
                        (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel C i) in
    CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso _ K4 (CoImage (φ1 · φ2)) (Cokernel (KernelArrow K4)).

  Definition CohomologyComplexIso_Mor7 (C : Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i : hz) :
    let CK1 := CokernelOut
                 (to_Zero A)
                 (Cokernel (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))))
                 _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i) in
    A⟦Kernel CK1,
      Kernel
        (CokernelArrow
           (make_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
                        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · CokernelArrow
                                     (Cokernel
                                        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                                    (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                                    (Diff C (i - 1))))) CK1
                        (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel_Eq C i)
                        (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel C i)))⟧ :=
    @KernelInPaths_is_iso_mor
      A (to_Zero A) _ _ _ _ (! (CohomologyComplexIso_CokernelArrow C i)) (Kernel _) (Kernel _).

  Definition CohomologyComplexIso_Mor8 (C : Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i : hz) :
    let φ1 := KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) in
    let φ2 := CokernelArrow (Cokernel (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                                  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                                  (Diff C (i - 1)))) in
    let CK4 := make_Cokernel _ _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel_Eq C i)
                           (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel C i) in
    iso (Kernel (CokernelArrow CK4)) (Image (φ1 · φ2)) :=
    let φ1 := KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) in
    let φ2 := CokernelArrow (Cokernel (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                                  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                                  (Diff C (i - 1)))) in
    let CK4 := make_Cokernel _ _ _ (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel_Eq C i)
                           (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel C i) in
    CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso CK4 _ (Kernel (CokernelArrow CK4)) (Image (φ1 · φ2)).

    (* The idea is to pre- and postcompose with morphisms to reach inverse of

    (* Change source and target by compose and postcompose with isomorphisms *)

             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))))
K2:= KernelPath A (to_Zero A) f2 (Kernel (Diff C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)
   · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))
K2':= KernelCompMonic A (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
  (factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) K2: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
CK3:= EpiToCokernel' A
  (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i)) K2': Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K2')
CK4:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1))))
     (CoImage (Diff C i))
     (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
     (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel_Eq C i)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel C i): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))))
A
⟦ Image
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C (i - 1))))),
CoImage
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1))))) ⟧

    exact (iso_inv_from_is_iso _ (is_iso_qinv _ _ (CoIm_to_Im_is_iso A (φ1 · φ2)))).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i C i
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
    ((CohomologyComplex A C
      :
      Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) i)
    ((CohomologyComplex A C
      :
      Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  ((CohomologyComplex' C
    :
    Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) i)
  ((CohomologyComplex' C
    :
    Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i + 1))
· CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i C (i + 1)

i: hz

  (CohomologyComplex A C (i + 1)) =

  (CohomologyComplex A C (i + 1))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1))))
           (CoImage (Diff C i))
           (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
           (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))))

              
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
is_iso
  (KernelCompMonic_mor1 A (to_Zero A)
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (CoImage (Diff C i))
        (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
        (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))
     (factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
           (CoImage (Diff C i))
           (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
           (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i)
         · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)))
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
           (CoImage (Diff C i))
           (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
           (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))))

              
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
K1:= Kernel
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
     (CoImage (Diff C i))
     (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
     (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
     (CoImage (Diff C i))
     (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
     (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))
is_iso
  (KernelCompMonic_mor1 A (to_Zero A)
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (CoImage (Diff C i))
        (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
        (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))
     (factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
           (CoImage (Diff C i))
           (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
           (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i)
         · factorization2_monic A (Diff C i))) K1)

              apply (KernelCompMonic1 A (to_Zero A)
                                      (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (CoImage (Diff C i))
                                                   (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
                                                   (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))
                                      (factorization2_monic A (Diff C i)) (Kernel _) K1).
          
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_iso
  (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor7 C i
   · (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor8 C i
      · inv_from_iso
          (CoIm_to_Im
             (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
              · CokernelArrow
                  (Cokernel
                     (transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (C (i - 1)))
                        (maponpaths C
                           (hzrminusplus i 1))
                        (Diff C (i - 1))))),,
           is_iso_qinv
             (CoIm_to_Im
                (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
                 · CokernelArrow
                     (Cokernel
                        (transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms
                              (C (i - 1)))
                           (maponpaths C
                              (hzrminusplus i 1))
                           (Diff C (i - 1))))))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                (CoIm_to_Im_is_iso A
                   (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
                    · CokernelArrow
                        (Cokernel
                           (transportf
                              (precategory_morphisms
                                 (C (...)))
                              (maponpaths C
                                 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                              (Diff C (i - 1)))))))
             (CoIm_to_Im_is_iso A
                (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
                 · CokernelArrow
                     (Cokernel
                        (transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms
                              (C (i - 1)))
                           (maponpaths C
                              (hzrminusplus i 1))
                           (Diff C (i - 1))))))))
   · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor6 C i
   · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor5 C i)

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_iso
  (KernelInPaths_is_iso_mor A (to_Zero A)
     (! CohomologyComplexIso_CokernelArrow C i)
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1))))
           (CoImage (Diff C i))
           (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
           (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i)))
     (Kernel
        (CokernelArrow
           (make_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
              (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
               · CokernelArrow
                   (Cokernel
                      (transportf
                         (precategory_morphisms
                            (C (i - 1)))
                         (maponpaths C
                            (hzrminusplus i 1))
                         (Diff C (i - 1)))))
              (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
                 (Cokernel
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (C (i - 1)))
                       (maponpaths C
                          (hzrminusplus i 1))
                       (Diff C (i - 1))))
                 (CoImage (Diff C i))
                 (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
                 (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))
              (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel_Eq C i)
              (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel C i)))))

                       apply KernelInPaths_is_iso.

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_iso
  (CohomologyComplexIso_KerCokerIso
     (make_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
         · CokernelArrow
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1)))))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1))))
           (CoImage (Diff C i))
           (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
           (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))
        (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel_Eq C i)
        (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel C i))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
         · CokernelArrow
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))))))
     (Kernel
        (CokernelArrow
           (make_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
              (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
               · CokernelArrow
                   (Cokernel
                      (transportf
                         (precategory_morphisms
                            (C (i - 1)))
                         (maponpaths C
                            (hzrminusplus i 1))
                         (Diff C (i - 1)))))
              (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
                 (Cokernel
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (C (i - 1)))
                       (maponpaths C
                          (hzrminusplus i 1))
                       (Diff C (i - 1))))
                 (CoImage (Diff C i))
                 (factorization2_epi A (Diff C i))
                 (CohomologyComplexIso_eq2 C i))
              (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel_Eq C i)
              (CohomologyComplexIso_isCokernel C i))))
     (Image
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
         · CokernelArrow
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1)))))))
 apply pr2.

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_iso
  (CohomologyComplexIso_CokerKerIso
     (Kernel
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
         · CokernelArrow
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))))))
     (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
           (Image
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1))))
           (factorization1_monic A
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1))))
           (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
         · CokernelArrow
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1)))))
        (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel_Eq C i)
        (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel C i))
     (CoImage
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
         · CokernelArrow
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))))))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelArrow
           (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
              (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                 (Kernel (Diff C i))
                 (Image
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (C (i - 1)))
                       (maponpaths C
                          (hzrminusplus i 1))
                       (Diff C (i - 1))))
                 (factorization1_monic A
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (C (i - 1)))
                       (maponpaths C
                          (hzrminusplus i 1))
                       (Diff C (i - 1))))
                 (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i))
              (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
               · CokernelArrow
                   (Cokernel
                      (transportf
                         (precategory_morphisms
                            (C (i - 1)))
                         (maponpaths C
                            (hzrminusplus i 1))
                         (Diff C (i - 1)))))
              (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel_Eq C i)
              (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel C i)))))
 apply pr2.

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_iso
  (CokernelOutPaths_is_iso_mor A (to_Zero A)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_KernelArrow C i)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelArrow
           (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
              (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                 (Kernel (Diff C i))
                 (Image
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (C (i - 1)))
                       (maponpaths C
                          (hzrminusplus i 1))
                       (Diff C (i - 1))))
                 (factorization1_monic A
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (C (i - 1)))
                       (maponpaths C
                          (hzrminusplus i 1))
                       (Diff C (i - 1))))
                 (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i))
              (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
               · CokernelArrow
                   (Cokernel
                      (transportf
                         (precategory_morphisms
                            (C (i - 1)))
                         (maponpaths C
                            (hzrminusplus i 1))
                         (Diff C (i - 1)))))
              (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel_Eq C i)
              (CohomologyComplexIso_isKernel C i))))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
           (Image
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1))))
           (factorization1_monic A
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1))))
           (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i))))
 apply CokernelOutPaths_is_iso.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_iso (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor2 C i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_iso
  (CokernelEpiComp_mor2 A (to_Zero A)
     (factorization1_epi A
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1))))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (Image
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C (i - 1))))
        (factorization1_monic A
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C (i - 1))))
        (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i))
     (Cokernel
        (factorization1_epi A
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C (i - 1)))
         · KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
             (Image
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))))
             (factorization1_monic A
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))))
             (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
           (Image
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1))))
           (factorization1_monic A
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1))))
           (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i))))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
K1:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Image
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (factorization1_monic A
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
  (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i): A
⟦ Image
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))), Kernel (Diff C i) ⟧
is_iso
  (CokernelEpiComp_mor2 A (to_Zero A)
     (factorization1_epi A
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))) K1
     (Cokernel
        (factorization1_epi A
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C (i - 1))) · K1)) (Cokernel K1))

        apply (CokernelEpiComp2 A (to_Zero A)
                                (factorization1_epi
                                   A (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                                    (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                                    (Diff C (i - 1))))
                                K1 (Cokernel _) (Cokernel _)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_iso (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor1 C i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_iso
  (CokernelOutPaths_is_iso_mor A (to_Zero A)
     (CohomologyComplexIso_mor_eq1 C i)
     (Cokernel
        (factorization1_epi A
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C (i - 1)))
         · KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
             (Image
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))))
             (factorization1_monic A
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))))
             (CohomologyComplexIso_eq1 C i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
           (C (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))))
 apply CokernelOutPaths_is_iso.
  Qed.

  Local Transparent is_iso_qinv.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
is_iso (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor C)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
is_iso (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor C)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz, is_iso (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor C i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_iso (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor C i)
 exact (CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i C i).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
iso (CohomologyComplex' C) (CohomologyComplex A C)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
iso (CohomologyComplex' C) (CohomologyComplex A C)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ CohomologyComplex' C,
CohomologyComplex A C ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
is_iso ?f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ CohomologyComplex' C,
CohomologyComplex A C ⟧
 exact (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor C).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
is_iso (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor C)
 exact (CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso C).
  Defined.

End def_cohomology'_complex.


(** * Definition of quasi-isomorphisms *)
(** ** Introduction
   A quasi-isomorphism is a morphism of complexes which maps to an isomorphisms by the cohomology
   functor H : C(A) -> C(A). See section [def_cohomology_complex] for definition of this functor.

   Quasi-isomorphisms are defined in [isQIS]. In [IdentityIsQIS] we show that identity morphism is
   a quasi-isomorphism, and in [CompIsQIS] we show that composition of quasi-isomorphisms is a
   quasi-isomorphism.
*)
Section def_quasi_isomorphisms.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.

  Definition isQIS {C1 C2 : (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)}
             (f : (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A)⟦C1, C2⟧) : UU :=
    is_iso (#(CohomologyFunctor A) f).

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
f: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop (isQIS f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
f: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop (isQIS f)

    apply isaprop_is_iso.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
isQIS (identity C)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
isQIS (identity C)

    exact (pr2 (functor_on_iso (CohomologyFunctor A) (identity_iso C))).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
f1: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H1: isQIS f1
f2: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
H2: isQIS f2
isQIS (f1 · f2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
f1: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H1: isQIS f1
f2: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
H2: isQIS f2
isQIS (f1 · f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
f1: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H1: isQIS f1
f2: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
H2: isQIS f2
is_iso (# (CohomologyFunctor A) (f1 · f2))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A
f1: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H1: isQIS f1
f2: ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
H2: isQIS f2
is_iso
  (# (CohomologyFunctor A) f1
   · # (CohomologyFunctor A) f2)

    apply (@is_iso_comp_of_isos (ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat A) _ _ _
                                (make_iso _ H1) (make_iso _ H2)).
  Qed.

End def_quasi_isomorphisms.


(** * Cohomology functor is an additive functor *)
(** ** Introduction
   In this section we show that the cohomology functor, [CohomologyFunctor], is an additive functor.
   This is shown in [CohomologyFunctor_Additive]. *)
Section def_cohomology_functor_additive.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
isAdditiveFunctor (CohomologyFunctor A)

  (* note: with primitive projections off, the goal can be written more simply as
            isAdditiveFunctor (CohomologyFunctor A)
   *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
isAdditiveFunctor (CohomologyFunctor A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
∏
a1 a2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A),
ismonoidfun # (CohomologyFunctor A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
ismonoidfun # (CohomologyFunctor A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
isbinopfun # (CohomologyFunctor A)
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
(λ _ : isbinopfun # (CohomologyFunctor A),
 # (CohomologyFunctor A) 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat) ?pr1

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
isbinopfun # (CohomologyFunctor A)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat
# (CohomologyFunctor A) (f1 + f2)%addmonoid =
(# (CohomologyFunctor A) f1 +
 # (CohomologyFunctor A) f2)%addmonoid

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat
∏ i : hz,
# (CohomologyFunctor A) (f1 + f2)%addmonoid i =
(# (CohomologyFunctor A) f1 +
 # (CohomologyFunctor A) f2)%addmonoid i

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat
i: hz
# (CohomologyFunctor A) (f1 + f2)%addmonoid i =
(# (CohomologyFunctor A) f1 +
 # (CohomologyFunctor A) f2)%addmonoid i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CohomologyMorphism_Mor A
  (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i =
Abelian_op A
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Mor A f1 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_Mor A f2 i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
           (C1 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
           (C1 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
           (C1 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
           (C1 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
           (C1 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
           (C1 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A CK1
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A CK1
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A CK1
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
     (Cokernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
           (C2 (i - 1))
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
   · CokernelArrow CK2)
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A CK1 CK2
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2)
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2)
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= CokernelOutOp (AbelianToAdditive A): ∏ (Z : Zero (AbelianToAdditive A)) (x y z : AbelianToAdditive A)
(f1 f2 : AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ y, z ⟧) (g : AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(CK : Cokernels.Cokernel Z g) (H1 : g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z)
(H2 : g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z),
CokernelOut Z CK z (to_binop y z f1 f2)
(PreAdditive.CokernelOutOp_Eq (AbelianToAdditive A) Z f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
to_binop CK z (CokernelOut Z CK z f1 H1) (CokernelOut Z CK z f2 H2)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
   · CokernelArrow CK2)
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A CK1 CK2
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2)
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2)
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= CokernelOutOp (AbelianToPreAdditive A): ∏ (Z : Zero A) (x y z : A) (f1 f2 : A ⟦ y, z ⟧) (g : A ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(CK : Cokernels.Cokernel Z g) (H1 : g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z)
(H2 : g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z),
CokernelOut Z CK z (Abelian_op A y z f1 f2)
(PreAdditive.CokernelOutOp_Eq (AbelianToPreAdditive A) Z f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
Abelian_op A CK z (CokernelOut Z CK z f1 H1) (CokernelOut Z CK z f2 H2)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
   · CokernelArrow CK2)
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A CK1 CK2
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2)
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2)
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= CokernelOutOp (AbelianToPreAdditive A): ∏ (Z : Zero A) (x y z : A) (f1 f2 : A ⟦ y, z ⟧) (g : A ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(CK : Cokernels.Cokernel Z g) (H1 : g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z)
(H2 : g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z),
CokernelOut Z CK z (Abelian_op A y z f1 f2)
(PreAdditive.CokernelOutOp_Eq (AbelianToPreAdditive A) Z f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
Abelian_op A CK z (CokernelOut Z CK z f1 H1) (CokernelOut Z CK z f2 H2)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
   · CokernelArrow CK2)
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
  (Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) CK2
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2)
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2))
  (PreAdditive.CokernelOutOp_Eq
     (AbelianToPreAdditive A) (to_Zero A)
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2)
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2)
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))

CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))

      · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)

        (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)

        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2))
  (PreAdditive.CokernelOutOp_Eq
     (AbelianToPreAdditive A) (to_Zero A)
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
      · CokernelArrow CK2)
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
        (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)

A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
       (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
       (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
       (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
          (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
     · CokernelArrow CK2)
    (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
       (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
    (Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) CK2
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
        · CokernelArrow CK2)
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
        · CokernelArrow CK2))
    (PreAdditive.CokernelOutOp_Eq
       (AbelianToPreAdditive A) (to_Zero A)
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
        · CokernelArrow CK2)
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
        · CokernelArrow CK2)
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (C1 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
       (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i)
       (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))

i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf

        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
· CokernelArrow CK2 =
CokernelArrow CK1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
    (Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) CK2
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
        · CokernelArrow CK2)
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
        · CokernelArrow CK2))
    (PreAdditive.CokernelOutOp_Eq
       (AbelianToPreAdditive A) (to_Zero A)
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
        · CokernelArrow CK2)
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
        · CokernelArrow CK2)
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (C1 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
       (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1 i)
       (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2 i))

        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))

(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))

  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
