   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
· CokernelArrow CK2 =

tmp:= to_postmor_linear' (A:=AbelianToAdditive A): ∏ (x y z : AbelianToAdditive A) (g h : AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(f : AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ y, z ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f = to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)

· CokernelArrow CK2 =

     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))

   · CokernelArrow CK2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= to_postmor_linear' (A:=AbelianToPreAdditive A): ∏ (x y z : A) (g h : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (f : A ⟦ y, z ⟧),
Abelian_op A x y g h · f = Abelian_op A x z (g · f) (h · f)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
· CokernelArrow CK2 =
Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) CK2
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
   · CokernelArrow CK2)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i)
   · CokernelArrow CK2)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= to_postmor_linear' (A:=AbelianToPreAdditive A): ∏ (x y z : A) (g h : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (f : A ⟦ y, z ⟧),
Abelian_op A x y g h · f = Abelian_op A x z (g · f) (h · f)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
· CokernelArrow CK2 =
Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i))
· CokernelArrow CK2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
· CokernelArrow CK2 =
Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i))
· CokernelArrow CK2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= KernelInOp (AbelianToAdditive A): ∏ (Z : Zero (AbelianToAdditive A)) (x y z : AbelianToAdditive A)
(f1 f2 : AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(K : Kernels.Kernel Z g) (H1 : f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z)
(H2 : f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z),
KernelIn Z K x (to_binop x y f1 f2)
(PreAdditive.KernelInOp_Eq (AbelianToAdditive A) Z f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
to_binop x K (KernelIn Z K x f1 H1) (KernelIn Z K x f2 H2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= KernelInOp (AbelianToPreAdditive A): ∏ (Z : Zero A) (x y z : A) (f1 f2 : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(K : Kernels.Kernel Z g) (H1 : f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z)
(H2 : f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z),
KernelIn Z K x (Abelian_op A x y f1 f2)
(PreAdditive.KernelInOp_Eq (AbelianToPreAdditive A) Z f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
Abelian_op A x K (KernelIn Z K x f1 H1) (KernelIn Z K x f2 H2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= KernelInOp (AbelianToPreAdditive A): ∏ (Z : Zero A) (x y z : A) (f1 f2 : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(K : Kernels.Kernel Z g) (H1 : f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z)
(H2 : f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z),
KernelIn Z K x (Abelian_op A x y f1 f2)
(PreAdditive.KernelInOp_Eq (AbelianToPreAdditive A) Z f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
Abelian_op A x K (KernelIn Z K x f1 H1) (KernelIn Z K x f2 H2)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i))
  (PreAdditive.KernelInOp_Eq (AbelianToPreAdditive A)
     (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
     (Diff C2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i))
  (PreAdditive.KernelInOp_Eq (AbelianToPreAdditive A)
     (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
     (Diff C2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i))
  (PreAdditive.KernelInOp_Eq (AbelianToPreAdditive A)
     (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
     (Diff C2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i))
  (PreAdditive.KernelInOp_Eq (AbelianToPreAdditive A)
     (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
     (Diff C2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f1 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A f2 i))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i =
Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= to_premor_linear' (A:=AbelianToAdditive A): ∏ (x y z : AbelianToAdditive A) (f : AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i =
Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= to_premor_linear' (A:=AbelianToPreAdditive A): ∏ (x y z : A) (f : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g h : A ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · Abelian_op A y z g h = Abelian_op A x z (f · g) (f · h)
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i =
Abelian_op A (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f1 i)
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · f2 i)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
tmp:= to_premor_linear' (A:=AbelianToPreAdditive A): ∏ (x y z : A) (f : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g h : A ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · Abelian_op A y z g h = Abelian_op A x z (f · g) (f · h)
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i =
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· Abelian_op A (C1 i) (C2 i) (f1 i) (f2 i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1, f2: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2 i =
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· Abelian_op A (C1 i) (C2 i) (f1 i) (f2 i)
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
(λ _ : isbinopfun # (CohomologyFunctor A),
 # (CohomologyFunctor A) 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat)
  ((λ f1 f2 : (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat,
    MorphismEq
      (# (CohomologyFunctor A) (f1 + f2)%addmonoid)
      (# (CohomologyFunctor A) f1 +
       # (CohomologyFunctor A) f2)%addmonoid
      (λ i : hz,
       ((let CK1 :=
           Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
           in
         (let CK2 :=
            Cokernel
              (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                 (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms (C2 (...)))
                    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                 (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
            in
          (let tmp :=
             CokernelOutOp (AbelianToAdditive A) in
           internal_paths_rew (A ⟦ CK1, CK2 ⟧)
             (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
                (Abelian_op A (Kernel (...)) CK2
                   (KernelIn ... ... ... ... ...
                    · CokernelArrow CK2)
                   (KernelIn ... ... ... ... ...
                    · CokernelArrow CK2))
                (PreAdditive.CokernelOutOp_Eq
                   (AbelianToPreAdditive A)
                   (to_Zero A)
                   (KernelIn ... ... ... ... ...
                    · CokernelArrow CK2)
                   (KernelIn ... ... ... ... ...
                    · CokernelArrow CK2)
                   (KernelIn (...) (...) (...) (...)
                      (...))
                   (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero
                      A f1 i)
                   (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero
                      A f2 i)))
             (λ p : A ⟦ CK1, CK2 ⟧,
              CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
                (KernelIn ... ... ... ... ...
                 · CokernelArrow CK2)
                (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
                   (...) i) = p)
             (CokernelOutsEq (to_Zero A) CK1
                (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
                   (KernelIn ... ... ... ... ...
                    · CokernelArrow CK2)
                   (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero
                      A (...) i))
                (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
                   (Abelian_op A (...) CK2 (...) (...))
                   (PreAdditive.CokernelOutOp_Eq (...)
                      (...) (...) (...) (...) (...)
                      (...)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A ⟦ Kernel ..., CK2 ⟧)
                   (CokernelArrow CK1
                    · CokernelOut ... CK1 CK2 ... ...)
                   (KernelIn ... ... ... ... ...
                    · CokernelArrow CK2)
                   (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                      (...) (...) (...) (...))
                   (CokernelCommutes (...) CK1 CK2
                      (...) (...))))
             (Abelian_op A CK1 CK2
                (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
                   (KernelIn ... ... ... ... ...
                    · CokernelArrow CK2)
                   (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero
                      A f1 i))
                (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
                   (KernelIn ... ... ... ... ...
                    · CokernelArrow CK2)
                   (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero
                      A f2 i)))
             (tmp (to_Zero A) (C1 (i - 1))
                (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) CK2
                (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel ...)
                   (Kernel ...) (... · ...)
                   (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
                      f1 i) · CokernelArrow CK2)
                (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel ...)
                   (Kernel ...) (... · ...)
                   (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
                      f2 i) · CokernelArrow CK2)
                (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (...))
                   (C1 (...))
                   (transportf (...) (...) (...))
                   (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1
                      i)) CK1
                (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
                   f1 i)
                (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
                   f2 i)))
          :
          CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
            (Cokernel
               (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                  (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms ...)
                     (maponpaths C2 ...) (Diff C2 ...))
                  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2
                     i)))
            (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
               (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
               (KernelArrow (Kernel ...)
                · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1
                    f2 i)
               (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
                  (MorphismOp (...) f1 f2) i)
             · CokernelArrow
                 (Cokernel
                    (KernelIn (...) (...) (...) (...)
                       (...))))
            (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
               (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2)
               i) =
          Abelian_op A CK1
            (Cokernel
               (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                  (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms ...)
                     (maponpaths C2 ...) (Diff C2 ...))
                  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2
                     i)))
            (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
               (Cokernel
                  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel ...)
                     (C2 ...) (transportf ... ... ...)
                     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A
                        C2 i)))
               (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (...))
                  (Kernel (...))
                  (KernelArrow ... · f1 i)
                  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
                     f1 i)
                · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (...)))
               (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1
                  i))
            (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
               (Cokernel
                  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel ...)
                     (C2 ...) (transportf ... ... ...)
                     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A
                        C2 i)))
               (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (...))
                  (Kernel (...))
                  (KernelArrow ... · f2 i)
                  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
                     f2 i)
                · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (...)))
               (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2
                  i)))
         :
         CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel
              (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                 (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms (C1 (...)))
                    (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
                 (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
           (Cokernel
              (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                 (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms (C2 (...)))
                    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                 (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
           (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
              (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
              (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
               · MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1
                   f2 i)
              (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
                 (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1
                    f2) i)
            · CokernelArrow
                (Cokernel
                   (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                      (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
                      (C2 (i - 1))
                      (transportf
                         (precategory_morphisms ...)
                         (maponpaths C2 ...)
                         (Diff C2 ...))
                      (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A
                         C2 i))))
           (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
              (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2)
              i) =
         Abelian_op A
           (Cokernel
              (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                 (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms (C1 (...)))
                    (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
                 (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
           (Cokernel
              (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                 (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms (C2 (...)))
                    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                 (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
           (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
              (Cokernel
                 (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                    (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms (...))
                       (maponpaths C1 (...))
                       (Diff C1 (...)))
                    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A
                       C1 i)))
              (Cokernel
                 (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                    (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms (...))
                       (maponpaths C2 (...))
                       (Diff C2 (...)))
                    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A
                       C2 i)))
              (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                 (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
                 (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
                 (KernelArrow (Kernel (...)) · f1 i)
                 (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
                    f1 i)
               · CokernelArrow
                   (Cokernel
                      (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                         (Kernel ...) (C2 ...)
                         (transportf ... ... ...)
                         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq
                            A C2 i))))
              (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f1
                 i))
           (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
              (Cokernel
                 (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                    (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms (...))
                       (maponpaths C1 (...))
                       (Diff C1 (...)))
                    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A
                       C1 i)))
              (Cokernel
                 (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                    (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms (...))
                       (maponpaths C2 (...))
                       (Diff C2 (...)))
                    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A
                       C2 i)))
              (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                 (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
                 (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
                 (KernelArrow (Kernel (...)) · f2 i)
                 (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
                    f2 i)
               · CokernelArrow
                   (Cokernel
                      (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                         (Kernel ...) (C2 ...)
                         (transportf ... ... ...)
                         (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq
                            A C2 i))))
              (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A f2
                 i)))
        :
        CohomologyMorphism_Mor A
          (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f1 f2) i =
        Abelian_op A
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
          (Cokernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
          (CohomologyMorphism_Mor A f1 i)
          (CohomologyMorphism_Mor A f2 i))
       :
       # (CohomologyFunctor A) (f1 + f2)%addmonoid i =
       (# (CohomologyFunctor A) f1 +
        # (CohomologyFunctor A) f2)%addmonoid i))
   :
   isbinopfun # (CohomologyFunctor A))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
CohomologyMorphism A
  (ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2) =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
CohomologyMorphism A
  (ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2) i =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2) i

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism A
  (ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2) i =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2) i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: pr1 hz
CohomologyMorphism_Mor A
  (ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2) i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: pr1 hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2) i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2) i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))

        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))

           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))

(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2) i)
· CokernelArrow CK2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) · CokernelArrow CK2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2) i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2) i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: pr1 hz
CK1:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (C1 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C1 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i)) (C2 (i - 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
(CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
AdditiveFunctor
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
AdditiveFunctor
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
A: AbelianPreCat
isAdditiveFunctor ?F

    
A: AbelianPreCat
ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
 exact (CohomologyFunctor A).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
isAdditiveFunctor (CohomologyFunctor A)
 exact CohomologyFunctor_isAdditive.
  Defined.

End def_cohomology_functor_additive.



(** * CohomologyFunctor factors through naive homotopy category *)
(** ** Introduction
   We show that there exists a functor K(A) -> K(A) such that the following diagram is commutative
                           C(A) -> C(A)
                             |      ||         (Think this as a triangle)
                           K(A) -> C(A)
   Here C(A) -> C(A) is the cohomology functor H : C(A) -> C(A), [CohomologyFunctor], see section
   [def_cohomology_complex]. The vertical functor C(A) -> K(A) is the canonical functor
   [ComplexHomotFunctor]. The constructed functor K(A) -> K(A) is also additive. Using this
   functor we define quasi-isomorphisms for K(A).

   On objects this functor sends a complex X to its cohomology complex. This is easily verified to
   commute because the vertical functors are identity on objects. To construct the map on morphisms
   we  first show that two homotopic, [ComplexHomotSubset], morphisms in C(A) are mapped to the
   same morphism by the cohomology functor for C(A). Thus, given a morphism f in K(A), for every
   morphism f' which maps to f by C(A) -> K(A) the image under C(A) -> C(A) is the same, that is,
   is contractible. This is the observation we use to define the map on morphisms. After this
   observation it is easy to see that the diagram is commutative.

   In [CohomologyFunctorHomotopy] it is shown that a morphism induced by homotopy is sent to the
   zero morphism in C(A). In [CohomologyFunctorHomotopies] we use this observation to prove that
   two homotopic morphisms are sent to the same morphisms by the cohomology functor. In
   [CohomologyFunctorH_Mor] we show that the image on morphisms is contractible, in
   [CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data] we construct the functor data for K(A) -> C(A), and finally
   in [CohomologyFunctorH] we construct the functor. Commutativity of the diagram is proved in
   [CohomologyFunctorHCommutes]. The fact that K(A) -> C(A) is additive is proved in
   [CohomologyFunctorH_Additive].
*)
Section def_cohomology_homotopy.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.


  (** ** Homotopic maps are mapped to equal morphisms by the cohomology functor C(A) -> C(A) *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (H i · Diff C2 (i - 1)) · Diff C2 i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (H i · Diff C2 (i - 1)) · Diff C2 i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
    (maponpaths C2 (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
    (H i · Diff C2 (i - 1)) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· (H i · Diff C2 (i - 1)) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· (H i · Diff C2 (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· (H i · (Diff C2 (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C2 (i - 1): Diff C2 (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A)) (C2 (i - 1))
(C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· (H i · (Diff C2 (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C2 (i - 1): Diff C2 (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C2 (i - 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· (H i · (Diff C2 (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C2 (i - 1): Diff C2 (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C2 (i - 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· (H i
   · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C2 (i - 1))
       (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· (H i
   · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C2 (i - 1))
       (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** Homotopy is mapped to ZeroArrow *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
CohomologyMorphism A
  (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H) =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
CohomologyMorphism A
  (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H) =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
CohomologyMorphism A
  (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H) i =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2) i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism A
  (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H) i =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2) i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
CohomologyMorphism_Mor A
  (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H) i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
      · ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H i)
     (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
        (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H)
        i)
   · CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
             (C2 (i - 1))
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
     (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H) i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (C1 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
       (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
       (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        · ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H
            i)
       (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
          (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
             H) i)
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel
            (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
               (C2 (i - 1))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
                  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
                  (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
               (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))))
    (CohomologyMorphism_Ker_Coker_Zero A
       (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H)
       i) =
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
        (C1 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
          (C1 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C1 i)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))

       (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))

  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))

   · ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H i)

        (C2 (i - 1))

     (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H) i) =
tmp

          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))

  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · H i

KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · H i
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (Diff C2 (i - 1))

i: hz

  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · H i
   · transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) (C2 i)) =

    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))

A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
       (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (H i · Diff C2 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyFunctorHomotopy_eq1 H i): A ⟦ Kernel (Diff C1 i), Kernel (Diff C2 i) ⟧
e0: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · Abelian_op A (C1 i) (C2 i)
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
          (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (H i · Diff C2 (i - 1)))
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
          (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
          (Diff C1 i · H (i + 1))))
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
        H) i) = tmp
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H i)
  (CohomologyMorphism_KernelIn_comm A
     (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H) i)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))

        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)
      · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i))))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (H i · Diff C2 (i - 1)) =
H i
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C2 i)))

C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz

· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (Diff C2 (i - 1)) =

· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (Diff C2 (i - 1))
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
       (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (H i · Diff C2 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyFunctorHomotopy_eq1 H i) =
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i)) · H i
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
    (C2 (i - 1))
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
  (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
   · transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
       (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (H i · Diff C2 (i - 1)))
  (CohomologyFunctorHomotopy_eq1 H i)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))

i: hz

· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
     (C2 (i - 1))

        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))

C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)

i: hz

· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C2 (i - 1))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
          (C2 (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))

A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
H: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C1 i))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C2 i))
        (C2 (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C2 i)))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g

A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
inv:= to_inv (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g): ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1, CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2 ⟧
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
inv:= to_inv (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g): ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1, CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2 ⟧
tmp:= grrcan
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1 -->
   CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)%abgrcat inv: (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f + inv)%addmonoid =
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g + inv)%addmonoid
→ # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f = # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g

(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g + inv)%addmonoid
→ # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f = # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g

A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
tmp:= rinvax
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g): to_binop (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1) (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g)
(to_inv (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g)) =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1) (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f +
 to_inv (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g))%addmonoid =
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g +
 to_inv (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g))%addmonoid

  f g
tmp:= rinvax
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g): to_binop (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1) (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g)
(to_inv (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g)) =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1) (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f +
 to_inv (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) g))%addmonoid =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)

  f g

 # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) (to_inv g))%addmonoid =

A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f (to_inv g): # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
to_binop (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1) (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) (to_inv g))
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f +
 # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) (to_inv g))%addmonoid =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
