  f g
tmp: to_binop (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1) (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) (to_inv g)) =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g))
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f +
 # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) (to_inv g))%addmonoid =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
tmp: to_binop (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1) (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) f)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) (to_inv g)) =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A) (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g))
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
isaprop
  (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
     (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
   to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
     (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2))
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
(∑ b : ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2,
 pr1 b = (f - g)%abgr)
→ # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
    (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
  to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
    (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
isaprop
  (# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
     (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
   to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
     (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2))

      apply has_homsets_ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
(∑ b : ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2,
 pr1 b = (f - g)%abgr)
→ # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
    (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
  to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
    (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
H': ∑
b : ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1
      C2, pr1 b = (f - g)%abgr
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
H1: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
H2: pr1 H1 = (f - g)%abgr
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
H11: (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: pr1 (H11,, H12) = (f - g)%abgr
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: pr1 (H11,, H12) = (f - g)%abgr
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
to_unel (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1)
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
CohomologyMorphism A
  (MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
     (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)) =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  f g
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
CohomologyMorphism A H11 =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
CohomologyMorphism A H11 =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
isaprop
  (CohomologyMorphism A H11 =
   ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
     (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2))
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
(∑ H : ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2,
 ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H = H11)
→ CohomologyMorphism A H11 =
  ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
    (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
isaprop
  (CohomologyMorphism A H11 =
   ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
     (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2))

      apply has_homsets_ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
(∑ H : ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2,
 ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H = H11)
→ CohomologyMorphism A H11 =
  ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
    (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
G: ∑ H : ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2,
ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) H = H11
CohomologyMorphism A H11 =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
G1: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
G2: ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) G1 =
H11
CohomologyMorphism A H11 =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2 H11
H2: H11 =
MorphismOp (AbelianToAdditive A) f
  (MorphismOp_inv (AbelianToAdditive A) g)
G1: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
G2: ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) G1 =
H11
CohomologyMorphism A
  (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) G1) =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
G1: ComplexHomot (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2
CohomologyMorphism A
  (ComplexHomotMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) G1) =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (CohomologyComplex A C1) (CohomologyComplex A C2)

    apply CohomologyFunctorHomotopy.
  Qed.


  (** ** Structure for the image of a morphism to make type cheking faster *)

  Definition CohomologyFunctorHIm {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)}
             (f : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦C1, C2⟧) : UU :=
    ∑ (h : (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))⟦CohomologyComplex A C1,
                                                             CohomologyComplex A C2⟧),
    ∏ (f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦C1, C2⟧)
      (H : # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' = f),
    h = # (CohomologyFunctor A) f'.

  Definition CohomologyFunctorHImMor {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)}
             {f : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦C1, C2⟧}
             (h : CohomologyFunctorHIm f) :
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))⟦CohomologyComplex A C1,
                                                      CohomologyComplex A C2⟧ := pr1 h.

  Definition CohomologyFunctorHImEq {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)}
             {f : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦C1, C2⟧}
             (h : CohomologyFunctorHIm f)
             (f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦C1, C2⟧)
             (H : # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' = f) :
    CohomologyFunctorHImMor h = # (CohomologyFunctor A) f' := pr2 h f' H.

  Definition make_CohomologyFunctorHIm {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)}
             (f : (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))⟦C1, C2⟧)
             (h : (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))⟦CohomologyComplex A C1,
                                                                    CohomologyComplex A C2⟧)
             (HH : ∏ (f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦C1, C2⟧)
                     (H : # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' = f),
                   h = # (CohomologyFunctor A) f') : CohomologyFunctorHIm f :=
    tpair _ h HH.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
h = h'

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
h = h'

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
pr1 h = pr1 h'
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
transportf
  (λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
         ⟦ CohomologyComplex A C1,
         CohomologyComplex A C2 ⟧,
   ∏
   f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
        ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' =
   f → x = # (CohomologyFunctor A) f') ?p (pr2 h) =
pr2 h'

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
pr1 h = pr1 h'
 exact e.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
transportf
  (λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
         ⟦ CohomologyComplex A C1,
         CohomologyComplex A C2 ⟧,
   ∏
   f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
        ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' =
   f → x = # (CohomologyFunctor A) f') e (pr2 h) =
pr2 h'
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
isaprop
  (∏
   f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
        ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' =
   f → pr1 h' = # (CohomologyFunctor A) f')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
∏
t : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
    C2 ⟧,
isaprop
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) t = f
   → pr1 h' = # (CohomologyFunctor A) t)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
t0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) t0 =
   f → pr1 h' = # (CohomologyFunctor A) t0)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
t0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) t0 = f
→ isaprop (pr1 h' = # (CohomologyFunctor A) t0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
h, h': CohomologyFunctorHIm f
e: CohomologyFunctorHImMor h =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor h'
t0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H0: # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) t0 =
f
isaprop (pr1 h' = # (CohomologyFunctor A) t0)
 apply has_homsets_ComplexPreCat.
  Qed.

  (** ** Construction of the functor and commutativity  *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' =
f
# (CohomologyFunctor A) (pr1 H) =
# (CohomologyFunctor A) f'

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' =
f
# (CohomologyFunctor A) (pr1 H) =
# (CohomologyFunctor A) f'

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' =
f
subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2)
  (pr1 H) f'

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' =
f
setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel
     (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2))
  (pr1 H) =
setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel
     (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2))
  f'

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' =
f
f =
setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel
     (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2))
  f'
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' =
f
setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel
     (ComplexHomotSubgrp (AbelianToAdditive A) C1 C2))
  f' = f
 exact H'.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat

C2 ⟧
iscontr (CohomologyFunctorHIm f)

f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ CohomologyComplex A C1, CohomologyComplex A C2 ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
∏
f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
     ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' = f
→ ?h = # (CohomologyFunctor A) f'

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ CohomologyComplex A C1, CohomologyComplex A C2 ⟧
 exact ((# (CohomologyFunctor A) (hfiberpr1 _ _ H))).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
∏
f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
     ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' = f
→ # (CohomologyFunctor A)
    (hfiberpr1
       # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
       H) = # (CohomologyFunctor A) f'
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' =
f
# (CohomologyFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f H) =
# (CohomologyFunctor A) f'
 exact (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor_eq f H f' H').
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
∏ t : CohomologyFunctorHIm f,
t =
make_CohomologyFunctorHIm f
  (# (CohomologyFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        f H))
  (λ (f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive
             (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧)
   (H' : # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
           f' = f),
   CohomologyFunctorH_Mor_eq f H f' H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
t: CohomologyFunctorHIm f
t =
make_CohomologyFunctorHIm f
  (# (CohomologyFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        f H))
  (λ (f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive
             (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧)
   (H' : # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
           f' = f),
   CohomologyFunctorH_Mor_eq f H f' H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
t: CohomologyFunctorHIm f
CohomologyFunctorHImMor t =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (make_CohomologyFunctorHIm f
     (# (CohomologyFunctor A)
        (hfiberpr1
           # (ComplexHomotFunctor
                (AbelianToAdditive A)) f H))
     (λ (f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧)
      (H' : # (ComplexHomotFunctor
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)) f' = f),
      CohomologyFunctorH_Mor_eq f H f' H'))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H: hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
t: CohomologyFunctorHIm f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f H) =
f

      exact (hfiberpr2 _ _ H).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (identity C))) =
identity (CohomologyComplex A C)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (identity C))) =
identity (CohomologyComplex A C)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
# (CohomologyFunctor A) (identity C) =
identity (CohomologyComplex A C)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
identity (CohomologyFunctor A C) =
identity (CohomologyComplex A C)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C2,
C3 ⟧
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor f))
· CohomologyFunctorHImMor
    (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor g))

C3 ⟧
f': hfiber

g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
# (CohomologyFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f

· # (CohomologyFunctor A)

A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C2,
C3 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
tmp:= functor_comp (CohomologyFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     f f')
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     g g'): # (CohomologyFunctor A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f f'
· hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g g') =
# (CohomologyFunctor A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f f')
· # (CohomologyFunctor A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g g')
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
# (CohomologyFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
     f')
· # (CohomologyFunctor A)
    (hfiberpr1
       # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
       g')

f': hfiber

g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
tmp:= functor_comp (CohomologyFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     f f')
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     g g'): # (CohomologyFunctor A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f f'
· hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g g') =
# (CohomologyFunctor A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f f')
· # (CohomologyFunctor A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g g')
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
# (CohomologyFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
     f'
   · hfiberpr1
       # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
       g')

C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,

f': hfiber

g': hfiber

# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))

     f'
   · hfiberpr1
       # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
       g') = f · g

A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C2,
C3 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
f · g = f · g
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
functor_data
  (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
functor_data
  (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
→ ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
A: AbelianPreCat
(λ F : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
       → ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A),
 ∏ a b : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A),
 ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ a, b ⟧
 → ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ 
   F a, F b ⟧) ?pr1

    
A: AbelianPreCat
ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
→ ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
 exact (CohomologyComplex A C).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
(λ F : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
       → ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A),
 ∏ a b : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A),
 ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ a, b ⟧
 → ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ 
   F a, F b ⟧)
  (λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A),
   CohomologyComplex A C)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ CohomologyComplex A C1, CohomologyComplex A C2 ⟧
 exact (CohomologyFunctorHImMor (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor f))).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
is_functor CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data

  
A: AbelianPreCat
is_functor CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data

    
A: AbelianPreCat
functor_idax CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data
A: AbelianPreCat
functor_compax CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data

    
A: AbelianPreCat
functor_idax CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
# CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data (identity C) =
identity (CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data C)
 use CohomologyFunctorH_Mor_Id.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
functor_compax CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C2,
C3 ⟧
# CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data (f1 · f2) =
# CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data f1
· # CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data f2
 use (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor_Comp f1 f2).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)

ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)

functor_data
  (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
A: AbelianPreCat
(λ F : functor_data
         (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
         (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)),
 is_functor F) ?pr1

    
A: AbelianPreCat
functor_data
  (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
 exact CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
(λ F : functor_data
         (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
         (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)),
 is_functor F) CohomologyFunctorH_functor_data
 exact CohomologyFunctorH_isfunctor.
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
∙ CohomologyFunctorH = CohomologyFunctor A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
∙ CohomologyFunctorH = CohomologyFunctor A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
pr1
  (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
   ∙ CohomologyFunctorH) = pr1 (CohomologyFunctor A)
A: AbelianPreCat
transportf is_functor ?p
  (pr2
     (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
      ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) =
pr2 (CohomologyFunctor A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
pr1
  (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
   ∙ CohomologyFunctorH) = pr1 (CohomologyFunctor A)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
pr11 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
      ∙ CohomologyFunctorH) =
pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)
A: AbelianPreCat
transportf
  (λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
         → ComplexPreCat_Additive
             (AbelianToAdditive A),
   ∏
   a b : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A),
   ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ a, b
   ⟧
   → ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
     ⟦ x a, x b ⟧) ?p
  (pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
         ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) =
pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
pr11 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
      ∙ CohomologyFunctorH) =
pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)
 apply idpath.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
transportf
  (λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
         → ComplexPreCat_Additive
             (AbelianToAdditive A),
   ∏
   a b : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A),
   ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ a, b
   ⟧
   → ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
     ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (idpath (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)))
  (pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
         ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) =
pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
      ∙ CohomologyFunctorH) =
pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
      ∙ CohomologyFunctorH) ~
pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
(pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) C1 =
(pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1

        
A: AbelianPreCat
C1: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
(pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) C1 ~
(pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
(pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) C1 C2 =
(pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1 C2

        
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
(pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) C1 C2 ~
(pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1 C2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
(pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) C1 C2 f =
(pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1 C2 f

        use (CohomologyFunctorHImEq
               (iscontrpr1
                  (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor
                     (# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f))) f
               (idpath _)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
transportf is_functor
  (total2_paths_f
     (idpath (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (∏
         a
          b : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                (AbelianToAdditive A),
         ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
         ⟦ a, b ⟧
         → ComplexPreCat_Additive
             (AbelianToAdditive A)
           ⟦ (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)) a,
           (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)) b ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)
                  → ComplexPreCat_Additive
                      (AbelianToAdditive A),
            ∏
            a
             b : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                   (AbelianToAdditive A),
            ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ a, b ⟧
            → ComplexPreCat_Additive
                (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
           (idpath (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)))
           (pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)
                  ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)))
        (pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)
               ∙ CohomologyFunctorH))
        (λ p : ∏
               a
                b : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                      (AbelianToAdditive A),
               ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ a, b ⟧
               → ComplexPreCat_Additive
                   (AbelianToAdditive A)
                 ⟦ (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)) a,
                 (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)) b ⟧,
         p = pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A))
        (funextsec
           (λ t : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A),
            ∏
            b : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                  (AbelianToAdditive A),
            ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ t, b ⟧
            → ComplexPreCat_Additive
                (AbelianToAdditive A)
              ⟦ (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)) t,
              (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)) b ⟧)
           (pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)
                  ∙ CohomologyFunctorH))
           (pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A))
           ((λ C1 : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                      (AbelianToAdditive A),
             funextsec
               (λ t : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                        (AbelianToAdditive A),
                ComplexPreCat_Additive
                  (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1, t ⟧
                → ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)
                  ⟦ (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1,
                  (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)) t ⟧)
               ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor
                         (AbelianToAdditive A)
                       ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) C1)
               ((pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1)
               ((λ C2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                          (AbelianToAdditive A),
                 funextsec
                   (λ _ : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                            (AbelianToAdditive A)
                          ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
                    ComplexPreCat_Additive
                      (AbelianToAdditive A)
                    ⟦ (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1,
                    (pr11 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C2 ⟧)
                   ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor
                             (AbelianToAdditive A)
                           ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) C1
                      C2)
                   ((pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1 C2)
                   ((λ f : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                             (AbelianToAdditive A)
                           ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
                     CohomologyFunctorHImEq
                       (iscontrpr1
                          (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor ...))
                       f (idpath (# ... f)))
                    :
                    (pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor (...)
                           ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) C1
                      C2 ~
                    (pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1 C2))
                :
                (pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor
                         (AbelianToAdditive A)
                       ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) C1 ~
                (pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)) C1))
            :
            pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)
                  ∙ CohomologyFunctorH) ~
            pr21 (CohomologyFunctor A)))
        (idpath_transportf
           (λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)
                  → ComplexPreCat_Additive
                      (AbelianToAdditive A),
            ∏
            a
             b : ComplexPreCat_Additive
                   (AbelianToAdditive A),
            ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ a, b ⟧
            → ComplexPreCat_Additive
                (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
           (pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)
                  ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)))))
  (pr2
     (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)
      ∙ CohomologyFunctorH)) =
pr2 (CohomologyFunctor A)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
isaprop (is_functor (pr1 (CohomologyFunctor A)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
has_homsets
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))

      use has_homsets_ComplexPreCat.
  Qed.


  (** ** Additivity of CohomologyFunctorH *)

  Local Opaque to_binop.
  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
# CohomologyFunctorH
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2) =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (CohomologyFunctorH C1) (CohomologyFunctorH C2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
# CohomologyFunctorH
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2) =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (CohomologyFunctorH C1) (CohomologyFunctorH C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
# CohomologyFunctorH
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2) =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2) =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))) C1
  C2
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
e0: # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) C1 C2) =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  C1 C2
# CohomologyFunctorH
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2) =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2) =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))) C1
  C2

      apply AdditiveFunctorZeroArrow.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
e0: # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) C1 C2) =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  C1 C2
# CohomologyFunctorH
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2) =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
e0: # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) C1 C2) =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  C1 C2
# CohomologyFunctorH
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     (ZeroArrow
        (Additive.to_Zero
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A))) C1 C2)) =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
# CohomologyFunctorH
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     (ZeroArrow
        (Additive.to_Zero
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A))) C1 C2)) =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
  (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
  (# CohomologyFunctorH g)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
  (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
  (# CohomologyFunctorH g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
isaprop
  (# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
   to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
     (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
     (# CohomologyFunctorH g))
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
→ # CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
  to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
    (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
    (# CohomologyFunctorH g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
isaprop
  (# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
   to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
     (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
     (# CohomologyFunctorH g))

      apply has_homsets_ComplexPreCat.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
→ # CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
  to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
    (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
    (# CohomologyFunctorH g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
  (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
  (# CohomologyFunctorH g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
isaprop
  (# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
   to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
     (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
     (# CohomologyFunctorH g))
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
→ # CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
  to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
    (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
    (# CohomologyFunctorH g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
isaprop
  (# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
   to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
     (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)

      apply has_homsets_ComplexPreCat.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
→ # CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
  to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
    (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
    (# CohomologyFunctorH g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
  (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
  (# CohomologyFunctorH g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (to_binop C1 C2 f g))) =
to_binop (CohomologyComplex A C1)
  (CohomologyComplex A C2)
  (CohomologyFunctorHImMor
     (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor f)))
  (CohomologyFunctorHImMor
     (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor g)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (to_binop C1 C2 f g))) =
to_binop (CohomologyComplex A C1)
  (CohomologyComplex A C2)
  (# (CohomologyFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        f f'))
  (CohomologyFunctorHImMor
     (iscontrpr1 (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor g)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (to_binop C1 C2 f g))) =
to_binop (CohomologyComplex A C1)
  (CohomologyComplex A C2)
  (# (CohomologyFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        f f'))
  (# (CohomologyFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        g g'))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     f f')
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     g g'): # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
(to_binop C1 C2
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f f')
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g g')) =
to_binop (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1) (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f f'))
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g g'))
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (to_binop C1 C2 f g))) =
to_binop (CohomologyComplex A C1)
  (CohomologyComplex A C2)
  (# (CohomologyFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        f f'))
  (# (CohomologyFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        g g'))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear
  (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     f f')
  (hfiberpr1
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     g g'): # (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
(to_binop C1 C2
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f f')
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g g')) =
to_binop (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C1) (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A C2)
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f f'))
(# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g g'))
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (to_binop C1 C2 f g))) =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (to_binop C1 C2
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        g g'))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
CohomologyFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (CohomologyFunctorH_Mor (to_binop C1 C2 f g))) =
# (CohomologyFunctor_Additive A)
  (to_binop C1 C2
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        g g'))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (to_binop C1 C2
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        g g')) = to_binop C1 C2 f g

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
to_binop
  (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A) C1)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A) C2)
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        f f'))
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        g g')) = to_binop C1 C2 f g

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
to_binop
  (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A) C1)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A) C2) f
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
     (hfiberpr1
        # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A))
        g g')) = to_binop C1 C2 f g
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
f': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) f
g': hfiber
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A)) g
to_binop
  (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A) C1)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor (AbelianToAdditive A) C2) f g =
to_binop C1 C2 f g
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
isAdditiveFunctor CohomologyFunctorH

  
A: AbelianPreCat
isAdditiveFunctor CohomologyFunctorH

    
A: AbelianPreCat
∏ a1 a2 : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A),
# CohomologyFunctorH
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     a1 a2) =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (CohomologyFunctorH a1) (CohomologyFunctorH a2)
A: AbelianPreCat
∏
(a1 a2 : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
(f
 g : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ a1,
     a2 ⟧),
# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop a1 a2 f g) =
to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH a1)
  (CohomologyFunctorH a2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
  (# CohomologyFunctorH g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
∏ a1 a2 : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A),
# CohomologyFunctorH
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     a1 a2) =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (CohomologyFunctorH a1) (CohomologyFunctorH a2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
# CohomologyFunctorH
  (ZeroArrow
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     C1 C2) =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (CohomologyFunctorH C1) (CohomologyFunctorH C2)
 exact (CohomologyFunctorH_Additive_zero C1 C2).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
∏
(a1 a2 : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
(f
 g : ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ a1,
     a2 ⟧),
# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop a1 a2 f g) =
to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH a1)
  (CohomologyFunctorH a2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
  (# CohomologyFunctorH g)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
# CohomologyFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
to_binop (CohomologyFunctorH C1)
  (CohomologyFunctorH C2) (# CohomologyFunctorH f)
  (# CohomologyFunctorH g)
 exact (CohomologyFunctorH_Additive_linear f g).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
AdditiveFunctor
  (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))

  (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
A: AbelianPreCat
isAdditiveFunctor ?F

    
A: AbelianPreCat
ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
 exact CohomologyFunctorH.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
isAdditiveFunctor CohomologyFunctorH
 exact CohomologyFunctorH_isAdditive.
  Defined.
  Local Transparent to_binop.


  (** ** Quasi-isomorphisms in K(A) *)

  Definition isHQIS {C1 C2 : (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))}
             (f : (ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))⟦C1, C2⟧) : UU :=
    is_iso (# CohomologyFunctorH_Additive f).

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
isaprop (isHQIS f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
isaprop (isHQIS f)

    apply isaprop_is_iso.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
isHQIS (identity C)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
isHQIS (identity C)

    exact (pr2 (functor_on_iso CohomologyFunctorH (identity_iso C))).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H1: isHQIS f1
f2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C2,
C3 ⟧
H2: isHQIS f2
isHQIS (f1 · f2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H1: isHQIS f1
f2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C2,
C3 ⟧
H2: isHQIS f2
isHQIS (f1 · f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H1: isHQIS f1
f2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C2,
C3 ⟧
H2: isHQIS f2
is_iso (# CohomologyFunctorH_Additive (f1 · f2))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f1: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C1,
C2 ⟧
H1: isHQIS f1
f2: ComplexHomot_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ C2,
C3 ⟧
H2: isHQIS f2
is_iso
  (# CohomologyFunctorH_Additive f1
   · # CohomologyFunctorH_Additive f2)

    apply (@is_iso_comp_of_isos (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) _ _ _
                                (make_iso _ H1) (make_iso _ H2)).
  Qed.

End def_cohomology_homotopy.


(** * Complex of kernels and complex of cokernels
   Let X be a complex. We construct a complex of kernels, which has objects ker d^{i+1}, and a
   complex of cokernels, which has objects coker d^{i-1}. The differentials of these complexes are
   the induced morphisms obtained by KernelIn and CokernelOut. For all integers i, we construct a
   morphisms h^i : coker d^{i-1} -> ker d^{i+1}, which is unique up to 2 commutative triangles.
   We show that the ith cohomology of X is isomorphic to the kernel of h^i and that the (i+1)th
   cohomology of X is isomorphic to cokernel of h^i. These results will be used, together with the
   snake lemma, to construct the long exact sequence associated to a short exact sequence of
   complexes.

   The complex of kernels is constructed in [KernelComplex]. The complex of cokernels is
   constructed in [CokernelComplex]. The morphism h^i is constructed in [CokernelKernelMorphism],
   where it is also shown to be unique with respect to the 2 commutative triangles. An isomorphism
   of ith cohomology of X with the kernel of h^i is constructed in [CokernelKernelCohomology1]. An
   isomorphism of the (i+1)th cohomology of X with cokernel of h^i is constructed in
   [CokernelKernelCohomology2].
 *)
Section def_kernel_cokernel_complex.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.

  (** ** Construction of kernel and cokernel complexes *)
  (** *** Complex of kernels *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · Diff C i
· Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (C (i + 1 + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · Diff C i
· Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (C (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
· (Diff C i · Diff C (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (C (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
· (Diff C i · Diff C (i + 1)) =
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C i) (C (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C i · Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C i) (C (i + 1 + 1))

    exact (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · Diff C i)
  (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     · Diff C (i + 1))
    (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · Diff C i)
  (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     · Diff C (i + 1))
    (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · Diff C i)
  (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     · Diff C (i + 1))
    (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i + 1))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · Diff C i)
  (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
     (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
      · Diff C (i + 1))
     (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i + 1))
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · Diff C i)
  (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C i)
· (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
   · Diff C (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · Diff C i)
  (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
· Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · Diff C i
· Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C i)) · Diff C i
· Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
  (C (i + 1 + 1))
 exact (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C i).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)

hz → AbelianToAdditive A

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
?D' i · ?D' (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (?D i) (?D (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
hz → AbelianToAdditive A
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A
 exact (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A
⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1))) i,
(λ i0 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1))) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A
⟦ (λ i : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) i,
(λ i : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)),
Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)) ⟧

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)), C (i + 1 + 1) ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
?h · Diff C (i + 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (C (i + 1 + 1 + 1))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)), C (i + 1 + 1) ⟧

i: hz
A

i: hz

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
A
 exact (C (i + 1)).
        
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)), C (i + 1) ⟧
 use KernelArrow.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
A ⟦ C (i + 1), C (i + 1 + 1) ⟧
 exact (Diff C (i + 1)).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) · Diff C (i + 1)
· Diff C (i + 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (C (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
 exact (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i + 1)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1 + 1)))
   (Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1)))
   (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1)))
    · Diff C (i0 + 1))
   (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i0 + 1))
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A
 ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i1 + 1))) i0,
 (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i1 + 1))) (i0 + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1 + 1)))
     (Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1)))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1)))
      · Diff C (i0 + 1))
     (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i0 + 1))
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A
   ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i1 + 1))) i0,
   (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i1 + 1))) (i0 + 1) ⟧)
    (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i0 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1))) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1))) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
   (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
   (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
    · Diff C (i + 1))
   (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i + 1))
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A
 ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1))) i,
 (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1))) (i + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i : hz,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
     (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
      · Diff C (i + 1))
     (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i + 1))
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A
   ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1))) i,
   (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i0 + 1))) (i + 1) ⟧)
    (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) i)
  ((λ i : hz, Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
  (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
   · Diff C (i + 1))
  (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i + 1))
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)))
     · Diff C (i + 1 + 1))
    (KernelComplex_Kernel_comm C (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 + 1)))
 exact (KernelComplex_comm C (i + 1)).
  Defined.


  (** *** Complex of cokernels *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i - 1 + 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
     (Diff C (i - 1 + 1))
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C (i - 1): Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A)) (C (i - 1))
(C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C (i - 1): Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C (i - 1): Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))))
  (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
    (transportf
       (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C
            (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
             hzrplusminus' (i + 1) 1))
       (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))))
    (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))

     (! maponpaths C

     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))))
  (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))

    (transportf
       (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)

· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))

     (transportf

             (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
        (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))
      · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))))
     (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C i)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
       (transportf
          (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C
               (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
                hzrplusminus' (i + 1) 1))
          (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))
        · CokernelArrow
            (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))))
       (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C (i + 1))) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))

i: hz

       (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
  (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))
· transportf
    (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C
         (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
          hzrplusminus' (i + 1) 1))

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf
  (λ x' : AbelianToAdditive A,
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C
       (hzrplusminus i 1 @ hzrminusplus' i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))
   · transportf
       (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C
            (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
             hzrplusminus' (i + 1) 1))
       (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))) =
transportf
  (λ x' : AbelianToAdditive A,
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C
       (hzrplusminus i 1 @ hzrminusplus' i 1))
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1 + 1))
     (C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf
  (λ x' : AbelianToAdditive A,
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C
       (hzrplusminus i 1 @ hzrminusplus' i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)
      · transportf
          (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C
               (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
                hzrplusminus' (i + 1) 1))
          (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))) =
transportf
  (λ x' : AbelianToAdditive A,
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C
       (hzrplusminus i 1 @ hzrminusplus' i 1))
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1 + 1))
     (C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf
  (λ x' : AbelianToAdditive A,
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C
     (! (hzrplusminus i 1 @ hzrminusplus' i 1)))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)
      · transportf
          (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C
               (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
                hzrplusminus' (i + 1) 1))
          (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))) =
transportf
  (λ x' : AbelianToAdditive A,
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C
     (! (hzrplusminus i 1 @ hzrminusplus' i 1)))
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1 + 1))
     (C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf
  (λ x : hz,
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ C x, C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (! (hzrplusminus i 1 @ hzrminusplus' i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)
      · transportf
          (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C
               (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
                hzrplusminus' (i + 1) 1))
          (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))) =
transportf
  (λ x' : AbelianToAdditive A,
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C
     (! (hzrplusminus i 1 @ hzrminusplus' i 1)))
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1 + 1))
     (C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1)))

  (λ x : hz,

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz

· transportf
    (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1 + 1) ⟧)

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i + 1 - 1) · Diff C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i + 1 - 1))
  (C (i + 1 - 1 + 1 + 1))

    exact (DSq _ C (i + 1 - 1)).
  Qed.

A: AbelianPreCat
