A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)
      :
      (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
        (C (i + 1 - 1)))
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
 exact (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C i).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i0 - 1)))
   (Cokernel (Diff C (i0 + 1 - 1)))
   (transportf
      (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i0 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
      (! maponpaths C
           (hzrminusplus i0 1 @ hzrplusminus' i0 1))
      (Diff C (i0 + 1 - 1)
       :
       (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i0 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
         (C (i0 + 1 - 1)))
    · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i0 + 1 - 1))))
   (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C i0)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A
 ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i1 - 1))) i0,
 (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i1 - 1))) (i0 + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i0 - 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i0 + 1 - 1)))
     (transportf
        (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i0 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C
             (hzrminusplus i0 1 @ hzrplusminus' i0 1))
        (Diff C (i0 + 1 - 1)
         :
         (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i0 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
           (C (i0 + 1 - 1)))
      · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i0 + 1 - 1))))
     (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C i0)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A
   ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i1 - 1))) i0,
   (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i1 - 1))) (i0 + 1) ⟧)
    (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i0 - 1))) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i0 - 1))) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
   (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
   (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
      (! maponpaths C
           (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
      (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)
       :
       (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
         (C (i + 1 - 1)))
    · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))))
   (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C i)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A
 ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i0 - 1))) i,
 (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i0 - 1))) (i + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
     (transportf
        (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C
             (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
        (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)
         :
         (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
           (C (i + 1 - 1)))
      · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))))
     (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C i)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A
   ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i0 - 1))) i,
   (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i0 - 1))) (i + 1) ⟧)
    (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) i)
  ((λ i : hz, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrplusminus' i 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))))
  (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
    (transportf
       (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C
            (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
             hzrplusminus' (i + 1) 1))
       (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))
     · CokernelArrow
         (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))))
    (CokernelComplex_Cokernel_comm C (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
 exact (CokernelComplex_comm C i).
  Defined.


  (** ** Construction of h^i and isomorphisms with cohomology *)
  (** *** Uniqueness and existence of h^i *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i - 1 + 1 + 1) ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
    (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 exact (DSq _ C (i - 1)).
  Qed.


  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (C (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i) · Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (C (i + 1 + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (C (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i) · Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (C (i + 1 + 1))

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i)
   · Diff C (i + 1)) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (C (i + 1 + 1))

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i)
· Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1 + 1)) (C (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i - 1 + 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
  (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1 + 1))
  (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1 + 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1 + 1))
  (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))

    exact (DSq _ C (i - 1 + 1)).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i)
  (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
   A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1)
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
       (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C i))
       (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
e2: ! hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrminusplus i 1 = idpath i

  (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrminusplus i 1) (Diff C i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
e2: ! hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrminusplus i 1 = idpath i
Diff C i =
transportf (λ x : hz, A ⟦ C x, C (i + 1) ⟧) (idpath i)
  (Diff C i)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 exact (DSq _ C (i - 1)).
  Qed.

     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))

  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
∏
t : ∑
    f : A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
        Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)) ⟧,
    KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
      (C i) (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
    transportf
      (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
       A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
      (hzrminusplus i 1)
      (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
    × CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
      f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))),
t =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i),,
CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
∏
t : ∑
    f : A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
        Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)) ⟧,
    KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
      (C i) (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
    transportf
      (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
       A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
      (hzrminusplus i 1)
      (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
    × CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
      f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))),
t =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i),,
CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i

(DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =

(hzrminusplus i 1) (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · t1
t22: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
t1 · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus' i 1))
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) · t1
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))) =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus' i 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))

t1: A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)) ⟧
t21: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i) (Diff C i)
(DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf (λ i0 : pr1 hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
(hzrminusplus i 1) (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · t1
t22: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
t1 · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
Diff C i = Diff C i
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
t1: A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)) ⟧
t21: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i) (Diff C i)
(DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf (λ i0 : pr1 hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
(hzrminusplus i 1) (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · t1
t22: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
t1 · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
transportf
  (λ x : A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
         Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)) ⟧,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (C i) (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
   transportf
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
     (hzrminusplus i 1)
     (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · x
   × CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
       (transportf (λ x0 : A, A ⟦ x0, C (i + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C i))
       (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
     x · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))
  (KernelInsEq (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     t1
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)), C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
           (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
           (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
              (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
         · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (λ p : A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
               C (i + 1) ⟧,
         t1 · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) =
         p)
        (CokernelOutsEq (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
           (t1 · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))
           (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
              (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1), C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (CokernelArrow
                 (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
               · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
                   (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
                   (C (i + 1))
                   (transportf
                      (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                      (! maponpaths C
                           (hzrminusplus i 1))
                      (Diff C i))
                   (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (λ p : A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1), C (i + 1) ⟧,
               CokernelArrow
                 (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
               · (t1
                  · KernelArrow
                      (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))) = p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1), C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (CokernelArrow
                    (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
                  · (t1
                     · KernelArrow
                         (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))))
                 (CokernelArrow
                    (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) · t1
                  · KernelArrow
                      (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1), C (i + 1) ⟧,
                  p =
                  transportf
                    (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C i))
                 (transport_source_path
                    (CokernelArrow
                       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
                     · t1
                     · KernelArrow
                         (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                       (! maponpaths C
                            (hzrminusplus i 1))
                       (Diff C i))
                    (! maponpaths C
                         (hzrminusplus' i 1))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (A ⟦ C i, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                       (transportf
                          (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                          (! maponpaths C
                               (hzrminusplus' i 1))
                          (transportf
                             (λ x : A,
                              A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                             (! maponpaths C
                                  (hzrminusplus i 1))
                             (Diff C i)))
                       (transportf
                          (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                          (! maponpaths C
                               (hzrminusplus i 1) @
                           ! maponpaths C
                               (hzrminusplus' i 1))
                          (Diff C i))
                       (λ p : A ⟦ C i, C (i + 1) ⟧,
                        transportf
                          (λ x' : A,
                           A ⟦ x', C (i + 1) ⟧)
                          (! maponpaths C
                               (hzrminusplus' i 1))
                          (CokernelArrow
                             (Cokernel ...) · t1
                           · KernelArrow
                               (Kernel (...))) = p)
                       (internal_paths_rew
                          (C (i - 1 + 1) = C i)
                          (maponpaths C
                             (! hzrminusplus' i 1))
                          (λ p : C (i - 1 + 1) = C i,
                           transportf
                             (λ x' : A,
                              A ⟦ x', C ... ⟧) p
                             (CokernelArrow ... · t1
                              · KernelArrow (...)) =
                           transportf
                             (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C ... ⟧)
                             (! maponpaths C (...) @ p)
                             (Diff C i))
                          (internal_paths_rew
                             (C i = C (i - 1 + 1))
                             (maponpaths C
                                (! hzrminusplus i 1))
                             (λ p : C i = C (...),
                              transportf (λ ..., ...)
                                (maponpaths C ...)
                                (... · ...) =
                              transportf (λ ..., ...)
                                (p @ ...) (Diff C i))
                             (internal_paths_rew
                                (C i = C i)
                                (maponpaths C
                                   (! ... @ ! ...))
                                (λ p : ... = ...,
                                 transportf ... ...
                                   ... =
                                 transportf ... p ...)
                                (let e0 := ... ... in
                                 internal_paths_rew_r
                                   ... ... ... ... ...
                                   e0
                                 :
                                 ... = ...)
                                (maponpaths C (! ...) @
                                 maponpaths C (! ...))
                                (maponpathscomp0 C
                                   (! hzrminusplus i 1)
                                   (! hzrminusplus' i
                                        1)))
                             (! maponpaths C
                                  (hzrminusplus i 1))
                             (maponpathsinv0 C
                                (hzrminusplus i 1)))
                          (! maponpaths C
                               (hzrminusplus' i 1))
                          (maponpathsinv0 C
                             (hzrminusplus' i 1)))
                       (transport_f_f
                          (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                          (! maponpaths C
                               (hzrminusplus i 1))
                          (! maponpaths C
                               (hzrminusplus' i 1))
                          (Diff C i))))
                 (assoc
                    (CokernelArrow
                       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) t1
                    (KernelArrow
                       (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))))
              (CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
                 (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
                 (C (i + 1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C i))
                 (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))))
        (KernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
           (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
           (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
              (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
   :
   pr1 (t1,, t21,, t22) =
   pr1
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i),,
      CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
      CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i))
  (pr2 (t1,, t21,, t22)) =
pr2
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i),,
   CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
   CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
t1: A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)) ⟧
t21: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i) (Diff C i)
(DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf (λ i0 : pr1 hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
(hzrminusplus i 1) (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · t1
t22: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
t1 · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
isaprop
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (C i) (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
   transportf
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
     (hzrminusplus i 1)
     (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
   · pr1
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
          (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
             (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
             (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C i))
             (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
          (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i),,
        CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
        CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i)
   × CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
       (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C i))
       (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
     pr1
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
          (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
             (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
             (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C i))
             (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
          (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i),,
        CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
        CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i)
     · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
t1: A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)) ⟧

t22: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
t1 · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
isaprop
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
   pr1
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i),,
      CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
      CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i)
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
t1: A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)) ⟧
t21: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i) (Diff C i)
(DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf (λ i0 : pr1 hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
(hzrminusplus i 1) (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · t1
t22: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
t1 · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
isaprop
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (C i) (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
   transportf
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
     (hzrminusplus i 1)
     (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
   · pr1
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
          (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
             (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
             (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C i))
             (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
          (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i),,
        CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
        CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i))
 apply homset_property.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
t1: A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)) ⟧
t21: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i) (Diff C i)
(DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf (λ i0 : pr1 hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
(hzrminusplus i 1) (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · t1
t22: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
t1 · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
isaprop
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
   pr1
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i),,
      CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
      CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i)
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))
 apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
∃! f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧,
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i)
  (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf
  (λ i0 : hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1)
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
× CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (C (i + 1))
    (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
  f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
∃! f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧,

  (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf
  (λ i0 : hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1)
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
× CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (C (i + 1))
    (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
  f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
∑ f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧,
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i)
  (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf
  (λ i0 : hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1)
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
× CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (C (i + 1))
    (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
  f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
(λ cntr : ∑
          f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i,
              KernelComplex C i ⟧,
          KernelIn (to_Zero A)
            (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i) (Diff C i)
            (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
          transportf
            (λ i0 : hz,
             A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
            (hzrminusplus i 1)
            (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
          · f
          × CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
              (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
            f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))),
 ∏
 t : ∑
     f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧,
     KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
       (C i) (Diff C i)
       (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
     transportf
       (λ i0 : hz,
        A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
       (hzrminusplus i 1)
       (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
     × CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
         (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
            (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (Diff C i))
         (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
       f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))),
 t = cntr) ?pr1

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
∑ f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧,
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i)
  (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf
  (λ i0 : hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1)
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
× CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (C (i + 1))
    (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
  f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat

i: hz
A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
(λ f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i)
   (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
 transportf
   (λ i0 : hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
   (hzrminusplus i 1)
   (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
 × CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
   f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))) ?pr1

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat

i: hz

⟧

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
?h · Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (C (i + 1 + 1))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz

i: hz

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1) · ?h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))

          
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1), C (i + 1) ⟧
 exact (transportf (λ (x : A), A⟦x, C(i + 1)⟧) (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                               (Diff C i)).
          
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) (C (i + 1))
 exact (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i).
        
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (C (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i) · Diff C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (C (i + 1 + 1))
 exact (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
(λ f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i)
   (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
 transportf
   (λ i0 : hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
   (hzrminusplus i 1)
   (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
 × CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
   f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
   :
   A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i)
  (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
   A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1)
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
       (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C i))
       (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
× CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (C (i + 1))
    (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
  KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
       (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C i))
       (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
  · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i)
  (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
   A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1)
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
       (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C i))
       (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (C (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i)
  (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
transportf
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
   A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (hzrminusplus i 1)
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
       (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C i))
       (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
 exact (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i).
        
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (C (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
 exact (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
(λ cntr : ∑
          f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i,
              KernelComplex C i ⟧,
          KernelIn (to_Zero A)
            (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) (C i) (Diff C i)
            (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
          transportf
            (λ i0 : hz,
             A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
            (hzrminusplus i 1)
            (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
          · f
          × CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
              (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
            f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))),
 ∏
 t : ∑
     f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧,
     KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
       (C i) (Diff C i)
       (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
     transportf
       (λ i0 : hz,
        A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
       (hzrminusplus i 1)
       (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
     × CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
         (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
            (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (Diff C i))
         (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
       f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))),
 t = cntr)
  ((KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
      (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
      (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
         (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
            (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (Diff C i))
         (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
      (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
    :
    A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧),,
   (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
    CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i
    :
    (λ f : A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i
           ⟧,
     KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
       (C i) (Diff C i)
       (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
     transportf
       (λ i0 : hz,
        A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
       (hzrminusplus i 1)
       (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
     × CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
         (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
            (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (Diff C i))
         (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
       f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))))
      (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
         (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
         (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
            (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
            (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
               (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C i))
            (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
         (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
       :
       A ⟦ CokernelComplex C i, KernelComplex C i ⟧)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
∏
t : ∑
    f : A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)),
        Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)) ⟧,
    KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
      (C i) (Diff C i) (DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) C i) =
    transportf
      (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
       A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
      (hzrminusplus i 1)
      (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) · f
    × CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
      f · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))),
t =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i),,
CokernelKernelMorphism_comm3 C i,,
CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2' C i
 exact (CokernelKernelMorphism_uni C i).
  Defined.


  (** *** Kernel and cohomology *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let CK :=
  Cokernel
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))) in
Diff C (i - 1)
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (CokernelArrow CK) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) CK

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let CK :=
  Cokernel
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (Diff C (i - 1))) in
Diff C (i - 1)
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (CokernelArrow CK) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) CK

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let CK :=
  Cokernel
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
       (maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
       (Diff C (i - 1))) in
Diff C (i - 1)
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
    (CokernelArrow CK) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1)) CK
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
 apply CokernelCompZero.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· transportf
    (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
    (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1))
· transportf
    (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
    (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
 use CokernelCompZero.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
KernelArrow
  (Kernel
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
              (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
        (Diff C i)
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (transportf
       (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
       (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C i))
       (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Kernel
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))) =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i)

A: AbelianPreCat

 exact (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))⟧)

                          (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))).

     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))

(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
KernelArrow K
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    CK
    (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))

    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K (C (i + 1))

pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1) ⟧) ?e
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (CokernelArrow CK)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
       (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)) =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1) ⟧) ?e
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
   · (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
      · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))))

   · (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))

        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
      · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))))

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz

  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)

           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))

  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))

tmp:= dirprod_pr2 (pr21 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i)): CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1) @

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
K:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
tmp:= dirprod_pr2 (pr21 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i)): CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
e0: ! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1) @
maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1) =
maponpaths C (idpath i)
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1) @
   maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (CokernelArrow CK)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i) =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
   · (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
      · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))))

pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))

       (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
K:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i) =
transportf
  (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (C (i + 1))
    (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
    (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i)

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)

  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
tmp:= dirprod_pr2 (pr21 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i)): CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
e0: CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) CK
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (CokernelArrow CK))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK (C (i + 1))
    (Diff C i)
    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
KernelArrow K
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    CK
    (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (CokernelArrow CK))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K (C (i + 1))

     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
K:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
tmp:= dirprod_pr2 (pr21 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i)): CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
CKO:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i): A ⟦ Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)), C (i + 1) ⟧
KernelArrow
  (Kernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) CKO
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))) · CKO =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Kernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) CKO
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
  (C (i + 1))

    (C (i + 1))

(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)

CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
K:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
tmp:= dirprod_pr2 (pr21 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i)): CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
(transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
(! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
(CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1' C i) =
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (C (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i)
 use KernelCommutes.
  Qed.

⟦ Kernel
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
       (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
       (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
          (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))

             (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C i))
          (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
       (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)),
Kernel
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)) ⟧

     (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
?h
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
    (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Kernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
  (C (i + 1))

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1) · ?h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1),
Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧
 exact (transportf (λ x' : A, precategory_morphisms x' _)
                          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                          (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                                               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                                               (Diff C (i - 1)))))).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1)
· transportf
    (λ x' : A,
     A ⟦ x',
     Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (CokernelArrow
       (Cokernel
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1))))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
 exact (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i).

          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))))))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
· CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· (inv_from_iso
     (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
      CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A)
       (Kernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
             (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
             (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
             (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
                (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
                (C (i + 1))
                (transportf
                   (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                   (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C i))
                (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
             (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
       (Kernel
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
             (Diff C i)
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
       (KernelArrow
          (Kernel
             (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
                (Cokernel
                   (transportf
                      (precategory_morphisms
                         (C (i - 1)))
                      (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                      (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
                (Diff C i)
                (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
        · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
            (Cokernel
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                  (Diff C (i - 1))))
            (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
            (transportf
               (λ x' : A,
                A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (CokernelArrow
                  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))))
            (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i)) =
identity
  (Kernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))

   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)

                (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))

   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)

             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1))))
       (transportf
          (λ x' : A,
           A ⟦ x',
           Cokernel
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))))))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
· CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· (inv_from_iso
     (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
      CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
       (KernelArrow K1
        · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
            (Cokernel
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                  (Diff C (i - 1)))) CK1
            (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (CokernelArrow CK1))
            (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i)) =
identity K2

                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)

          (CokernelArrow
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))))))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))

(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))

  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)

(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2
  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
· (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
   · (inv_from_iso
        (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
         CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
      · (KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
           (KernelArrow K1
            · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
                (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (CokernelArrow CK1))
                (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C
                   i))
           (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i)
         · KernelArrow K2))) =
identity K2 · KernelArrow K2

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz

  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))

           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)

     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))

  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
· (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
   · (inv_from_iso
        (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
         CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
      · (KernelArrow K1

                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (CokernelArrow CK1))
             (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i)))) =
identity K2 · KernelArrow K2

ee: CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· (inv_from_iso
     (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
      CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
   · (KernelArrow K1
      · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
          (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (CokernelArrow CK1))
          (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))) =
KernelArrow K1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
    (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (CokernelArrow CK1))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i)

  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
· (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
   · (inv_from_iso
        (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
         CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
      · (KernelArrow K1
         · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
             (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (CokernelArrow CK1))
             (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i)))) =

           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))

        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))

  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

· inv_from_iso

ee: CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· (inv_from_iso
     (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
      CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
   · (KernelArrow K1
      · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
          (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (CokernelArrow CK1))
          (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))) =
KernelArrow K1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
    (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (CokernelArrow CK1))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2
  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
· (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
   · (inv_from_iso
        (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
         CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
      · (KernelArrow K1
         · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
             (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (CokernelArrow CK1))
             (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i)))) =
KernelArrow K2

           (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))
K2:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))

CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧) ?e
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (CokernelArrow CK2)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK1))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i)) =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧) ?e
  (CokernelArrow CK1)

  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))
K2:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
  (maponpaths C
     (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrminusplus i 1))
  (CokernelArrow CK2)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
    (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (CokernelArrow CK1))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i) =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (CokernelArrow CK1)

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
K1:= Kernel
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (transportf

           (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))

     (Cokernel
        (transportf
