     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))
K2:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (idpath i)) (CokernelArrow CK2)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
    (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (CokernelArrow CK1))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i) =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (CokernelArrow CK1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
K1:= Kernel
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (Cokernel
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))
K2:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
CokernelArrow CK2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
    (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
       (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (CokernelArrow CK1))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i) =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (CokernelArrow CK1)

       apply CokernelCommutes.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1 C i
· CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2 C i =
identity
  ((CohomologyFunctor A C
    :
    Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) i)

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1 C i
· postcompose (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i)
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
       (Kernel
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
             (Diff C i)
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
       (Kernel
          (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
             (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
             (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
             (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
                (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
                (C (i + 1))
                (transportf
                   (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                   (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C i))
                (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
             (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
       (KernelArrow
          (Kernel
             (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
                (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
                (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
                (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
                   (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
                   (C (i + 1))
                   (transportf
                      (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                      (! maponpaths C
                           (hzrminusplus i 1))
                      (Diff C i))
                   (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
                (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
        · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
            (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
            (Cokernel
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                  (Diff C (i - 1))))
            (transportf
               (λ x' : A,
                A ⟦ x',
                Cokernel
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (C (i - 1)))
                     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                     (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
               (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (CokernelArrow
                  (Cokernel
                     (transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (C (i - 1)))
                        (maponpaths C
                           (hzrminusplus i 1))
                        (Diff C (i - 1))))))
            (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)) =
identity (CohomologyFunctor A C i)

i: hz
iso_inv_from_is_iso (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i)
  (CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (Kernel (pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i)))
    (CohomologyComplex' A C i)
    (KernelArrow
       (Kernel
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))

     · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C (i - 1))))
         (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))

            (λ x' : A,
             A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)

    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
           (Diff C i)
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
     (Kernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
           (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
           (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
              (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))

                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
     (KernelArrow
        (Kernel

              (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))

                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1))))

i: hz

  (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,

· KernelIn (to_Zero A)

          (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
             (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))

                (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))

          (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
    (Kernel
       (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
          (Cokernel
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
          (Diff C i)
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
    (KernelArrow
       (Kernel
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
             (Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
             (Diff C i)
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
     · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C (i - 1))))
         (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
         (transportf
            (λ x' : A,
             A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))))
         (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
           (Diff C i)
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
     (Kernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
           (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
           (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
              (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
     (KernelArrow
        (Kernel
           (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
              (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
              (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
              (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
                 (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
                 (C (i + 1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C i))
                 (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
      · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
          (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (Cokernel
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1))))
          (transportf
             (λ x' : A,
              A ⟦ x',
              Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
             (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (CokernelArrow
                (Cokernel
                   (transportf
                      (precategory_morphisms
                         (C (i - 1)))
                      (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                      (Diff C (i - 1))))))
          (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
     (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
   · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i) =
identity
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))

    (* Make the goal more readable *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
inv_from_iso
  (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
   CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (Kernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
          CK1
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
             (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C i))
             (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
          (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
    (Kernel
       (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
          (Cokernel
             (transportf

                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
          (Diff C i)

    (KernelArrow
       (Kernel

             (Cokernel

                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
             (Diff C i)
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
     · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
         (Cokernel
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
               (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
               (Diff C (i - 1)))) CK1
         (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (CokernelArrow CK1))
         (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                 (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C (i - 1)))) (C (i + 1))
           (Diff C i)
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
     (Kernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
           (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) CK1
           (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
     (KernelArrow
        (Kernel
           (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
              (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) CK1
              (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C i))
                 (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
      · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1
          (Cokernel
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1))))
          (transportf
             (λ x' : A,
              A ⟦ x',
              Cokernel
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                   (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                   (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
             (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (CokernelArrow
                (Cokernel
                   (transportf
                      (precategory_morphisms
                         (C (i - 1)))
                      (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                      (Diff C (i - 1))))))
          (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
     (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
   · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i) =
identity
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))

i: hz
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)

(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
inv_from_iso
  (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
   CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (Kernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
          CK1
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
             (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C i))
             (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
          (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
    (Kernel
       (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
          (Diff C i)
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
    (KernelArrow
       (Kernel
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
             (Diff C i)
             (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
     · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
         (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (CokernelArrow CK1))
         (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (Kernel
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
           (Diff C i)
           (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
     (Kernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
           (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) CK1
           (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
     (KernelArrow
        (Kernel
           (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
              (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) CK1
              (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C i))
                 (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
      · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
          (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
             (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (CokernelArrow CK2))
          (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
     (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
   · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i) =
identity
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
inv_from_iso
  (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
   CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (Kernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
          CK1
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
             (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C i))
             (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
          (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))) K1
    (KernelArrow K1
     · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
         (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (CokernelArrow CK1))
         (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1
     (Kernel
        (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
           (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) CK1
           (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                 (Diff C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
     (KernelArrow
        (Kernel
           (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
              (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) CK1
              (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                    (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                    (Diff C i))
                 (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
              (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))
      · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
          (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
             (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (CokernelArrow CK2))
          (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
     (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
   · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i) =
identity
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
K1:= Kernel
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))
K2:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
inv_from_iso
  (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
   CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
    (KernelArrow K1
     · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
         (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
            (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
            (CokernelArrow CK1))
         (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2
     (KernelArrow K2
      · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
          (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
             (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (CokernelArrow CK2))
          (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
     (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
   · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i) =
identity
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))

· KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1

    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2

          (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
     (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i)
   · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i) =
identity
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))

        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))

           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
KI21:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
(KernelArrow K1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
(transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (CokernelArrow CK1))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K1, K2 ⟧
KI12:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2
  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K2, K1 ⟧
inv_from_iso
  (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
   CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i) · KI21
· (KI12 · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i) =
identity
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
        (C (i - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))

    (* Begin to prove the equality *)
    (* Cancel the inv_from_iso *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
K1:= Kernel
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))
K2:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
KI21:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
(KernelArrow K1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
(transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (CokernelArrow CK1))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K1, K2 ⟧
KI12:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2
  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K2, K1 ⟧
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· (inv_from_iso
     (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
      CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i) · KI21
   · (KI12 · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i)) =
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· identity
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
          (C (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))

(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))

  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)

  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)

           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
KI21:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
(KernelArrow K1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
(transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (CokernelArrow CK1))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K1, K2 ⟧

  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K2, K1 ⟧

· inv_from_iso
    (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
     CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i) · KI21
· KI12 · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i =
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· identity
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
          (C (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))

  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
K1:= Kernel
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))

  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))

        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
KI21:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
(KernelArrow K1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
(transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (CokernelArrow CK1))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K1, K2 ⟧
KI12:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2
  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K2, K1 ⟧
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· inv_from_iso
    (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
     CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i) =
identity (CohomologyComplex' A C i)
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1)))
K1:= Kernel
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 
     (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 
     (C (i + 1)) (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))
K2:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 
        (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 
        (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
KI21:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
  (KernelArrow K1
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK1))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K1, K2 ⟧
KI12:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2
  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K2, K1 ⟧
e: CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· inv_from_iso
    (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
     CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i) =
identity
  ((CohomologyComplex' A C
    :
    Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) i)
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· inv_from_iso
    (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
     CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i) · KI21
· KI12 · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i =
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· identity
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) 
          (Kernel (Diff C i)) 
          (C (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
K1:= Kernel
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))
K2:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
KI21:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
(KernelArrow K1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
(transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (CokernelArrow CK1))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K1, K2 ⟧
KI12:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2
  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K2, K1 ⟧
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· inv_from_iso
    (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
     CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i) =
identity (CohomologyComplex' A C i)

      apply (iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso _ (CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i))).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK1:= Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Diff C (i - 1))
CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))
K1:= Kernel
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))
K2:= Kernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
KI21:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
(KernelArrow K1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
(transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (CokernelArrow CK1))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K1, K2 ⟧
KI12:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K1 K2
  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K2, K1 ⟧
e: CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· inv_from_iso
    (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
     CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i) =
identity
  ((CohomologyComplex' A C
    :
    Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) i)
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· inv_from_iso
    (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i,,
     CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i) · KI21
· KI12 · CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i =
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· identity
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C i))
          (C (i - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i)))

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz

CK2:= Cokernel
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C (i - 1)))

     (Diff C i)

  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))
     (Diff C i)
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C i))

  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1

        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     CK1
     (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 (C (i + 1))
        (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
           (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))
KI21:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) K2 K1
(KernelArrow K1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 CK1
(transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK1 ⟧)
(maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (CokernelArrow CK1))
(CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1_eq1 C i))

  (KernelArrow K2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK1 CK2
       (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', CK2 ⟧)
          (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (CokernelArrow CK2))
       (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i))
  (CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2_comm1 C i): A ⟦ K2, K1 ⟧

· (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
   · inv_from_iso
       (make_iso (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i)
          (CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i))) =
CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i
· inv_from_iso
    (make_iso (CohomologyComplexIso_Mor_i A C i)
       (CohomologyComplexIso_is_iso_i A C i))

        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) CK2 (C (i + 1))

             (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1))))))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i) =
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))))
· identity
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))

i: hz

  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1) @
   maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1))

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf
  (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrminusplus i 1))
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (transportf
       (λ x' : A,
        A ⟦ x',
        Cokernel
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))

          (Cokernel
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1))))))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i) =

   A ⟦ x',
   Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1))
  (CokernelArrow
     (Cokernel
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))))

i: hz
transportf
  (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
  (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (transportf
       (λ x' : A,
        A ⟦ x',
        Cokernel
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))

    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i) =

   Cokernel

        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1))
  (CokernelArrow
     (Cokernel
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))))

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (transportf
       (λ x' : A,
        A ⟦ x',
        Cokernel
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1))))))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i) =
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1))
  (CokernelArrow

           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (Cokernel
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))))
    (transportf
       (λ x' : A,
        A ⟦ x',
        Cokernel
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
             (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
       (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C (i - 1))))))
    (CokernelKernelCohomology1_eq C i) =
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   Cokernel
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (CokernelArrow
     (Cokernel
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1)))))
 apply CokernelCommutes.
  Qed.

  ((CohomologyFunctor A C
    :
    Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) i)

A
⟦ (CohomologyFunctor A C
   :

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz

· CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1 C i =

A: AbelianPreCat

· CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2 C i =

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2 C i
· CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1 C i =
identity (Kernel (pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i)))
 exact (CokernelKernelCohomology1_id1 C i).
        
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor1 C i
· CokernelKernelCohomology1_Mor2 C i =
identity (CohomologyFunctor A C i)
 exact (CokernelKernelCohomology1_id2 C i).
  Defined.


  (** *** Cokernel and cohomology *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let CK :=
  Cokernel
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
       (C (i + 1 - 1))
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
       (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1))) in
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · CokernelArrow CK =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CokernelComplex C i) CK

  
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
let CK :=
  Cokernel
    (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
       (C (i + 1 - 1))
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
       (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1))) in
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · CokernelArrow CK =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CokernelComplex C i) CK

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (C (i + 1 - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
        (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (C (i + 1 - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
        (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1)))
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · CokernelArrow CK =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CokernelComplex C i) CK
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (C (i + 1 - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
        (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1))): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (C (i + 1 - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
        (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
     (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1)))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
     (C (i + 1))
     (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
        (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C i))
     (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
  (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)
· CokernelArrow CK =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) CK

    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CK:= Cokernel
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
     (C (i + 1 - 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
        (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))

· KernelArrow (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1))) =

  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
  (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths C
     (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus i 1) 1))
  (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1) =
maponpaths C
  (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus i 1) 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 =
maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus i 1) 1
 apply isasethz.
  Qed.

  (i + 1) ⟧

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i) · ?h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CokernelComplex C i)
  ((CohomologyFunctor A C
    :
    Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i + 1))

i: hz

 use CokernelArrow.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
          (C (i + 1 - 1))
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
             (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
          (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CokernelComplex C i)
  ((CohomologyFunctor A C
    :
    Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i + 1))
 exact (CokernelKernelCohomology2_comm1 C i).
  Defined.

  (! maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ i0 : hz, A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
     (hzrminusplus i 1)
     (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))))
   · pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i))
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
          (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
             (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
             (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C i))
             (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
          (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i + 1 - 1))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))

   · CokernelArrow

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
transportf
  (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      A ⟦ C i0, Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)) ⟧)
     (hzrminusplus i 1)
     (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
    (Cokernel
       (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
          (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
          (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
             (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
             (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
                (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                (Diff C i))
             (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
          (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i + 1 - 1))
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1)))
        (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
           (Cokernel (Diff C (i - 1))) (C (i + 1))
           (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
              (! maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (Diff C i))
           (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm1 C i))
        (CokernelKernelMorphism_comm2 C i)))

    apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
  (C (i + 1 - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
  (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1)) · ?h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (C (i + 1 - 1))
  (Cokernel (pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i)))

  (C (i + 1 - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))

i: hz

· CokernelKernelCohomology2_Mor1 C i =
identity (CohomologyFunctor A C (i + 1))

A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
CokernelArrow
  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (C (i + 1 - 1))
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
           (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))
        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1)))) =

  (Cokernel
     (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (Diff C (i + 1)))
        (C (i + 1 - 1))
        (transportf

        (CohomologyComplex_KernelIn_eq A C (i + 1))))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

i: hz
iso (Cokernel (pr11 (CokernelKernelMorphism C i)))
  ((CohomologyFunctor A C
    :
    Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i + 1))

C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
A
⟦ (CohomologyFunctor A C
   :
   Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)) (i + 1),

 exact (CokernelKernelCohomology2_Mor2 C i).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
C: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
i: hz
is_inverse_in_precat
  (CokernelKernelCohomology2_Mor1 C i)
  (CokernelKernelCohomology2_Mor2 C i)
 exact (CokernelKernelCohomology2_inverses C i).
  Defined.

End def_kernel_cokernel_complex.

Local Transparent hz isdecrelhzeq hzplus iscommringops.
Close Scope hz_scope.
